english: One or more of your auto-orders have been made inactive. This may be because you owe a large payment to X.
translation: 你的一个或多个自动订单已失效，这可能是因为您欠 X 一大笔货款。

english: There is a dangerous build up of CO2 inside your ship. If it reaches 100%, your crew will suffocate. Consider buying a CO2 Scrubber and connecting it to a storage tank.
translation: 你的舰船内部正在积聚危险的二氧化碳，如果达到 100% 你的船员就会窒息，请考虑购买一个二氧化碳过滤器并将其连接到一个储罐。

english: Your ship has been struck by lightning, temporarily disabling some of your equipment.
translation: 您的舰船被闪电击中，部分设备暂时瘫痪。

english: There is a hole in your ship hull and the cabin is depressurising. Your crew will fix the breach, but you should consider closing your Door Vents to seal off the area.
translation: 船体上破了个洞，船舱正在减压。船员会修复破洞，但请考虑关闭舱门通风口以封闭该区域。

english: Your batteries have been drained. It is likely your reactors are not creating enough power to meet the needs of your ship. You will need either more Reactors, or more battery storage, or both.
translation: 船上的电池已经耗尽，反应堆可能无法产生足够的能量来满足舰船的需要。你需要更多的反应堆，或者更大的电池容量，或者两者兼而有之。

english: Oxygen must be at 50% to be breathable.
translation: 氧气含量必须达到 50% 才可以呼吸。

english: Your reactor has cut out. It is likely the fuel supply has been interrupted.  Consider using storage tanks to create a permanent store of fuel for your Reactor to draw from.
translation: 你的反应堆断电了很可能是燃料供应中断了。考虑使用储罐来储存燃料以供反应堆持续使用。

english: The stargate isn't being supplied with enough power. Use energy transmitters to supply the Stargate with power.
translation: 星门没有获得足够的能量，使用能量发射器为星门供电。

english: We need to collect usage data to help us to better understand how people are playing and to help us to improve the game. \n\nWe do not collect any personally identifiable information. If you are OK with this please hit the Accept button.
translation: 我们需要收集使用数据以帮助我们更好地了解玩家的游戏情况并帮助我们改进游戏。\n\n我们不会收集任何个人身份信息。如果您同意请点击 接受 按钮。
舰队中共有 *X 常驻居民
仙女座项目有限责任公司

english: Unload the Hyperspace Isotopes into Containers [*X/*Y]. *Z Containers used
translation: 将超空间同位素装入容器中 [*X/*Y]，已使用 *Z 个容器

english: Connect a Loader to the tank

translation: 运送超空间同位素容器 [*X/*Y]

english: Connect a tank to the Hyperspace Scoop
translation: 将储罐连接到超空间采集器

english: Thank you, Captain. I now have what I need to modify this FTL drive for the Short Range Hop.
translation: 谢谢你，舰长。我现在有了改装短程跳跃超光速引擎所需的东西。

english: It's going to take me some time to prepare the calculations.  Leave things to me and I'll call you when we're ready for the next phase.
translation: 我需要花一些时间来准备这些计算工作，把事情交给我吧。下一个环节准备好时，我会打电话给你。

english: Looks like you have a Hyperspace Scoop!  You can use this to gather the Hyperspace Isotopes I need.
translation: 看来你已经有了一个超空间采集器！可以用它来收集我所需要的超空间同位素。

english: You'll need to install the Scoop facing forward on the front of your ship, then connect its pipe output to a storage tank.
translation: 你需要将采集器朝前安装在舰船前部，然后将其管道输出端连接到储罐。

english: The Scoop works only when you are in hyperspace. So you'll need to gather the isotopes over a few FTL jumps.
translation: 采集器只有在超空间中才能发挥作用，因此你需要通过几次超光速跃迁来收集同位素。

english: You've collected some Hyperspace Isotopes in a tank! You'll need to pump them into Containers so we can easily move them between ships.
translation: 你已经在储罐中收集了一些超空间同位素，现在需要把它们泵入容器中以便于在舰船之间进行搬运。

english: Buy a LOADER from any trade post and install it near your Hyperspace Isotope tanks. Connect the pipes, and set the loader to 'UNLOAD'.
translation: 从任一贸易站购买一台装载器并将其安装在超空间同位素储罐附近，连接管道并将装载器设置为“卸载”。

english: You should also designate some storage space for the Isotope containers.
translation: 你还需要为同位素容器分配一些储存区。

english: Greetings Captain. My name is Dr. Martinez and I'm reaching out to ask for your help.
translation: 舰长您好。我是马丁内斯博士。我想需要您的帮助。

english: For years now my brother and I have been studying the high energy particle emissions in orbit of the black hole you can see behind us.  Its official designation is Qz247 - the collapsed remnants of a star that lived a couple of billion years ago.
translation: 多年来我和弟弟一直在研究我们身后黑洞轨道上的高能粒子辐射。它的正式名称是 Qz247 ————几十亿年前一颗恒星坍缩的残余物。

english: An accident with our equipment has left my brother in dire need of a rescue, and I need your help.
translation: 我们的设备出了故障，我弟弟急需救援，我需要你们的帮助。

english: You've gathered the materials I need! Bring them back to me at Qz247 to complete the contract.
translation: 你已经收集了我所需要的材料，把它们带回 Qz247 交给我完成合约。

english: I'm sending a shuttle to you now, Captain. Get your crew to load the Hyperspace Isotopes for me.
translation: 舰长，我现在派穿梭机去。请您安排船员为我搬运同位素。

english: Thank you for offering your services, Captain.

The Stargate project funded our research from the beginning.  They buy all the data we can collect, and the closer we travel to the event horizon, the more data our sensors receive. Every mission, we'd push ourselves to go closer.
translation: 星门工程从一开始就在资助我们的研究，他们会买下我们能收集到的任何数据。我们越接近事件视界，传感器收到的数据就越多。每次探险我们都会尝试进一步靠近事件视界。

english: The last time, we pushed it too far.  My brother Marcus took the sensor ship and flew closer than we've ever been before.  Right to the edge.  Closer than anyone has ever been.
translation: 上一次我们有点冲动了。我弟弟马库斯开着探测船，飞到了我们从未到达过的距离，就在事件视界边缘，前所未有的接近。

english: I've lost all contact, and he's been down there for a long time now.  He's still showing on the sensors, and his ship is still intact.  The gravitational forces and time dilation will be extreme.  But with your help, we're going to rescue him.
translation: 所有通讯手段都已失效，他已经在下面滞留很久了。传感器上仍然能看到他舰船，并且完好无损。引力造成的时间膨胀会非常大，但有您帮忙，我们一定能救把他救出来。

english: There's only one way to get to him without falling into the black hole ourselves.  We're going to have to do an extremely short range HYPERSPACE HOP.
translation: 目前只有一个办法，能在不掉进黑洞的前提下救起他。我们必须在极短的距离内进行超空间跃迁。

english: Using a modified FTL Drive you'll do one hyperspace hop toward the black hole, rescue my brother Marcus, then turn around and hop right out.  It will be dangerous, but it's the only way to avoid being dragged in ourselves.
translation: 使用一个改装过的超光速引擎，向黑洞进行一次超空间跃迁，救出我的弟弟马库斯，然后掉头跃迁回来。虽然很危险，但这是避免自己被吸进去的唯一办法。

english: I need materials to synthesise the resources we need.  You can help me with this, while I work on the calculations. I'll need Hyperspace Isotopes - you should be able to collect them easily enough, but you'll need to acquire a Hyperspace Scoop and a tank to store the isotopes in first.
translation: 我需要一些原料来合成跃迁所需的燃料，在我进行计算准备的时候，您可以帮我收集一下。我需要超空间同位素————您应该很容易就能收集到，但需要先买一个超空间采集集器和一个储存同位素的储罐。

english: You'll then need to use a Loader to start unloading the isotopes into containers.
translation: 然后您需要使用装载器将同位素卸载到容器中。

english: I'm building the Hyperspace FTL drive that will allow you to perform the hop.  It's going to need some modifications.  I'll need you to manufacture some parts for me. I know you have manufacturing facilities near the Stargate project.  You should be able to make these parts for me without too much trouble.
translation: 我正在改装可以进行短距跃迁的超光速引擎，需要您帮我生产一些部件。我知道你们在星门工程附近有座工厂，生产这些部件应该不会太麻烦。

english: Bring those materials back to me, and we can move onto phase 2.
translation: 把这些材料拿回来给我，就可以进入下一个环节了。

english: Excellent work, Captain.  I'll begin synthesising the FTL charges immediately.  It will take me a little while.
translation: 太棒了舰长。我马上开始合成超光速燃料，这会花一点时间。

english: I know the Stargate Project have been in touch and I know they want their data.  I get that, but let's remember the priority is safely recovering my brother.  Sometimes they take people for granted.
translation: 其实星门工程一直有在联系我，他们想要拿回那些数据。我明白数据的重要性，但请记住，首要任务仍然是把我弟弟安全救回来。他们总是把别人的付出当作理所当然。

english: I'll contact you when I'm ready to begin the rescue.
translation: 当救援行动准备好时，我会联系你的。

english: Captain.  My modifications to the FTL Drive are now complete.  We are ready now for phase 2 of my brother's rescue.
translation: 舰长，我对超光速引擎的改装已经完成。我们现在可以进行营救行动的下一个环节了。

english: Please come and see me and I'll explain what I need from you.
translation: 请到我这里来，我会向您详细说明需要做的内容。
与朱利安·马丁内斯对接

english: Return the Tilium Crystals to Dr. Martinez [*X/*Y]
translation: 把提利姆晶体还给马丁内斯博士 [*X/*Y]

english: Travel to an asteroid belt with Tilium deposits
translation: 前往一个蕴藏提利姆矿脉的小行星带

english: It looks like you have enough Tilium Crystals.  Bring the Tilium Crystals back to me to close the contract.
translation: 看来您有足够的提利姆晶体了，把提利姆晶体带回来给我以完成合约。

english: I'll send the shuttle to collect the Tilium Crystals. Thank you, Captain!
translation: 我会派穿梭机去接收提利姆晶体。谢谢您，舰长

english: I've completed work on the modified FTL drive, using those radioactive hyperspace isotopes you provided.
translation: 我已经使用您提供的放射性超空间同位素，完成了超光速引擎的改装。

english: With this FTL drive you'll be capable of performing an extremely short range FTL Hop in close proximity to the black hole.  You'll emerge directly on top of my twin brother's ship, and perform the rescue.
translation: 有了这个超光速引擎，您就能在黑洞附近进行极短距离的超光速跃迁。您将直接跃迁到我弟弟的舰船附近实施救援。

english: You'll need to make two jumps - one in and one out.  I've checked and double checked the calculations.  I'll need your help to make two FTL charges that work with the modified FTL Hop Drive.
translation: 您总共需要进行两次跃迁————一进一出。我已经反复检查过计算结果了，需要您帮忙准备2个超光速燃料，用于给改装过的超光速引擎充能。

english: I'll need quite a lot of Tilium Crystals for the FTL charges.  Tilium ore can be mined from just about any asteroid belt in the system - but you will need a Mining Laser to do it, and Drones to collect the mineral.
translation: 我需要大量的提利姆晶体来合成超光速燃料。提利姆矿石几乎可以从星系中的任何小行星带开采出来————但你需要一台采矿激光和无人机来收集矿石。

english: You'll then need a Smelter to process the ore into Tilium Crystals.  I have most of the equipment you'll need here.  If you dock with my ship I can send it over.
translation: 然后您需要一个冶炼机将矿石提炼成提利姆晶体。这些设备我这里已经准备好了，如果您将舰船与我对接，我会把它们都送过去。

english: Take those Mining Lasers and the drones and find an asteroid belt with some Tilium deposits.  Point the mining lasers at the Tilium and use the drones to collect the mineral.
translation: 带上采矿激光和无人机，找到一个蕴藏着提利姆矿脉的小行星带，将采矿激光对准提利姆矿脉，然后使用无人机收集矿石。

english: Once you've mined the resource you'll need to refine it into Tilium Crystals using the Smelter I've provided.
translation: 开采出矿石后，您需要使用我提供的冶炼机将其提炼成提利姆晶体。

english: Greetings, Captain.  I'm a representative of the Stargate Project.
translation: 舰长您好，我是星门工程的代表。

english: We heard about your involvement with the Martinez rescue mission and we wanted to offer our support.  The twins have been hugely important to the project from the beginning, and the data they have provided has enabled many of our biggest advancements.
translation: 我们听说您正在参与马丁内斯营救任务，我们想提供一些支持。自动星门项目开始以来，这两兄弟的研究一直非常重要，他们提供的数据使我们取得了许多重大进展。

english: When the accident occurred, the younger twin Marcus was collecting vital data on black hole Qz247.  Data that is simply impossible to acquire by any other means.  Data that we need to complete the Stargate.
translation: 事故发生时弟弟马库斯正在收集黑洞 Qz247 的重要数据。这些数据我们无法通过其他方式获得，我们需要这些数据来完成星门建造。

english: Their entire operation is funded by us. So I'm sure you believe us when we say that their safe rescue is very important to us - but just as important is the recovery of the data that remains trapped on Marcus' stricken vessel.
translation: 因此您应该能明白，他们能够安全获救对我们来说很重要……只不过取回马库斯搁浅船只上同样受困的数据也很重要。

english: We see no reason why you can't rescue both Marcus and the critical science data at the same time. If you can recover our data during the rescue, we will pay a substantial bonus.
translation: 我们认为您完全可以同时救援马库斯，和那批极其重要的科学数据。如果您能在救援行动中把我们的数据取回来，我们将支付一笔相当可观的酬金。

english: Think it over.  We'll be in touch.
translation: 请务必考虑一下，我们稍后再联系。
黑洞太阳 第二部分

english: It's time, Captain. I have everything prepared.  With your help, I can finally rescue my brother.
translation: 舰长，是时候了。一切都准备好了。有了您的帮助，我终于可以救出我弟弟了。

english: What took you so long? I was down there for hours!
translation: 你怎么花了那么长时间？我在下面等好几个小时了！

english: Wait, how long has it been?
translation: 等一下，你那边过了多长时间？

english: You were so close to the event horizon. The temporal distortion was huge.  I've been working on your rescue for a long time Marcus.
translation: 你离事件视界太近了，时间膨胀非常大。我为了救你已经努力了很久，马库斯。

english: You've been down there for 10 years.
translation: 你已经在下面呆了10年了。

english: I was beginning to think you wouldn't be coming!  I've been down here for hours!
translation: 我还以为你不来了呢！我已经在下面等好几个小时了！

english: Dock your ship with mine, Captain, and tell me when you're ready for me to come on board.  Please hurry!
translation: 舰长，请您将舰船与我对接，准备好让我登船时告诉我。请抓紧时间！

english: The Stargate data?  I can send that, Captain, but you'll have to give me a few minutes to access the data and set up the transmission.
translation: 舰长，星门数据可以发送，但您得给我几分钟时间调取数据、设置传输参数。

english: Damn it Captain, I don't have time for that!  I don't know how much longer the ship is going to survive like this.  I'll do my best, but you'd better be ready.
translation: 舰长！可恶，我快没时间了，不知道这艘船还能撑多久。我会尽力而为，但您最好已经做了万全准备。

english: I'm onboard, Captain.  Get us out of here!
translation: 舰长，我上舰了。请带我离开这里

english: My ship is falling apart from the gravitional forces, Captain.  I've sent the data that I can.  Please hurry and get me off this ship!
translation: 舰长，我的舰船正在被重力撕扯。能发的数据我都已经发送了，请快点让我离开这艘船

english: The reactor containment has failed, Captain.  The cabin is being flooded with radiation.  You have to get me out of here!
translation: 舰长，反应堆外壳已破裂，辐射正在船舱里蔓延，您必须把我弄出去了

english: Jump away from the black hole

translation: 营救马库斯·马丁内斯博士

english: Thank you so much, Captain. I couldn't have succeeded without your help. I'm so grateful you took my call and were here for us when we needed you.
translation: 非常感谢您，舰长。没有您的帮助我不可能成功。感谢你接了我的电话，在我们需要的时候及时出现

english: Here's your payment, and a little bonus.
translation: 这是您的报酬还有一点奖金。

english: It was really close.  I can't believe the risk the Captain made you take for that data.  You could easily have been killed.
translation: 真的好危险真不敢相信舰长让你冒这么大的风险去传数据你很可能会死

english: Captain, I spent the best part of a decade planning this rescue.  I don't appreciate you risking it all at the crucial moment.  I didn't think you'd take that kind of risk with his life.
translation: 舰长我花了十年的时间准备这次营救我不敢赞同你在危急时刻冒这个险我没想到你会拿他的生命冒这种险

english: Thank you for your efforts. The contract is closed.
translation: 感谢您的付出，合约已结束。

english: Jesus, Marcus! Get the medical team in here now!
translation: 马库斯！天啊，快叫医疗队过来！

english: What did you do Captain? Why did it take you so long to bring him on board? For what, for some data?
translation: 舰长你干了什么？为什么这么久才让他上船？为了那些数据？

english: His RAD badge is black.  He's been massively irradiated.  How could you do this to us?  I trusted you with this!
translation: 他的辐射徽章是黑色的，说明他已经暴露在超大剂量的辐射中。你怎么这样对我们？我那么信任你

english: Everything is ready, Captain.  I've produced the Hyperspace Modulators and the FTL fuel is already loaded.
translation: 舰长，一切准备就绪，短距跃迁引擎已经制作完成，超光速燃料也已装载完毕。

english: You'll be performing the rescue using my ship, using my modified FTL drive that is already installed onboard. You can take control of my ship when you are ready to begin the rescue.
translation: 您将驾驶我的舰船实施营救，使用我已经安装在舰船上的改装过的跃迁引擎。准备好开始营救时，你可以控制我的舰船。

english: This has been a long time coming, Captain.  I've been working on this rescue for years.  Time dilation effects from the Black Hole mean that only a few hours will have passed for my brother.  It will be a surprise to him just how much time has passed when you bring him out.
translation: 舰长，这一天我已经等了很久了。我为这次营救行动准备了很多年，黑洞产生的时间膨胀效应意味着我弟弟只经历了几个小时。当您把他带出来的时候，他一定会很惊讶时间到底过去了多久。

english: Let's run over the plan one last time.  You're going to perform an incredibly short range Hyperspace Hop, and you'll emerge directly on top of my brother's ship.  Dock with his ship, rescue him and then get out of there.  Hop in, Rescue, Hop out.
translation: 让我们最后复习一遍计划。您要进行一次超短程超空间跃迁，直接到达我弟弟的舰船附近，与他的舰船对接，救出他然后离开那里。跃迁进去，救援，再跃迁出来。

english: Once you take control of my ship, you'll find the location of Marcus' ship programmed into your Sector Map.  You will be jumping directly toward the black hole.  You should expect turbulance.
translation: 控制我的舰船之后，您会看到马库斯舰船的位置已经编入了星区地图。您将直接向黑洞跃迁，可能会遇到些许乱流

english: You won't have long.  Be as quick as you can and jump out of there when you're done.
translation: 到那后时间不多，动作越快越好，搞定就跃迁出来。

english: Good luck, Captain. I'll see you on the other side.
translation: 祝您好运，舰长。我等你的好消息。

english: Greetings, Captain.  Good luck with the rescue.  Remember the data onboard Marcus' ship is extremely valuable to us.  You'll need Marcus to transmit the data from his console before you can complete the rescue.
translation: 舰长您好，祝救援行动顺利。请记住，马库斯舰船上的数据对我们来说非常宝贵，在完成救援之前，您需要马库斯从控制台传送数据。

english: Losing that data will set the Stargate project back years.
translation: 失去这些数据，将使星门工程进度倒退数年。

english: We're really disappointed in your choices, Captain.  You've let us down and you've let the whole Stargate Project down, with your incredibly narrow thinking.
translation: 舰长，我们对您做出的选择很失望。您辜负我们，辜负了整个星门工程。您的思维太狭隘了。

english: The data you received is so incomplete that is is rendered virtually useless.  There will be no further bonus from us.
translation: 那些数据极度残缺，几乎毫无用处。我们不会提供任何报酬。

english: Well done on retrieving some of the data, Captain.  We would have preferred all of it, but we appreciate the rescue was under extreme duress.
translation: 舰长，您取回了部分数据，干得不错。我们原本期望能得到全部数据，但考虑到这次营救是在极端危急的情况下进行的，也可以接受

english: Our payment has been scaled accordingly with the volume of data received.
translation: 酬金已根据收到的数据量作相应调整。

english: Congratulations, Captain, on successfully recovering the science data from the stricken vessel.  This data represents a huge step forward in our understanding of high energy physics, and will hugely accelerate the Stargate Program.
translation: 祝贺您，舰长。科学数据已成功从搁浅舰船上取回。这些数据意味着我们对高能物理的理解向前迈进了一大步，并将大大加快星门工程的进程。

english: We're sorry to hear about the condition of Dr. Marcus Martinez.  In all honesty it is a miracle any rescue was even possible, given the circumstances.
translation: 对于马库斯·马丁内斯博士的病情，我们深表遗憾。老实说在当时的那种情况下，能够获救已经是奇迹。

english: Please accept our payment as a sign of our gratitude. We look forward to continuing to work with you.
translation: 请接受我们的酬金以表谢意，期待与您继续合作。
黑洞太阳 第三部分

english: Help Dr. Martinez rescue his brother.
translation: 帮助马丁内斯博士救出他的弟弟。

english: Complete Phase 6 of the Stargate Project
translation: 完成星门工程第六阶段

english: Greetings Captain. What you've found could prove to be very useful to the Stargate project.
translation: 舰长您好，您的发现对星门工程可能非常有用。

english: Since you've used our Stargate to reach the new sector, we believe it's only fair that you assist us with researching the uses of the new resources.
translation: 既然您利用我们的星门到达了新的星区，我们认为您协助我们研究新资源的用途很公平。

english: Your co-operation has been paramount in the project's sucess so far, and it must continue until the project is complete.
translation: 迄今为止与您的合作对项目的成功至关重要，在项目完成之前，请务必须继续下去。

english: Thank you, Captain. We will be in touch when you have completed your research.
translation: 谢谢您舰长。等您完成研究后，我们再联系。

english: The results of your research are very promising, and we'd like you to send us some refined samples of the new resources.
translation: 您的研究成果很有前途，我们希望您能给我们分享一些新资源的精制样本。

english: We expect a shipment of Neubidium ingots and the stabilised Zeleon gas.
translation: 我们希望能收到一批纽比迪姆锭和稳定泽利昂气体。

english: Thank you for your co-operation, Captain.

translation: 勇闯新星区 第一部分

english: I can't believe it, the Stargate worked! This is my greatest project, my greatest achievement, perhaps my final one too. Maybe I'll have the chance to see the new sector for myself one day.
translation: 真不敢相信，星门成功了，这是我参加过的最大规模的工程，最伟大的成就，也许就是我最后的成就了。希望有一天我会有机会亲眼目睹这个新星区。

english: I believe this is only the beginning though, the Andromeda Project have made it clear they want to reach a new galaxy, not just a new sector. I'm sure they will be in contact soon about the next steps of the Stargate.
translation: 我相信这仅仅是个开始，仙女座项目已经明确表示，他们希望去到的是一个新的星系，而不仅仅是一个新的星区。我相信他们很快会就星门的下一步计划与我们联系。

english: Thank you Captain, for all your hard work. Goodbye for now.
translation: 感谢您的辛勤工作舰长。再见。

english: Captain, our sector scan has found new systems. They contain shipyards that are currently being operated by pirates.
translation: 舰长，我们的星区扫描发现了一些新星系，这些星系中的船坞目前由海盗经营。

english: That's all from me Captain, good luck.
translation: 我这边的信息就这些了，祝您好运，舰长。

english: Their exterior wear leads us to believe that they have been here for at least a century. This sector must have been one of mankind's first attempts to colonise outer-space.
translation: 根据表面的磨损状态，我们认为这些海盗在这里至少已经盘踞了一个世纪。这个星区肯定是人类早期殖民外太空的尝试之一。

english: There are signs of a massive galactic war in this sector, with derelict ship signals appearing all across our sector map.
translation: 有迹象表明这个星区发生过一场大规模的银河战争，整个星区地图上都出现了废弃舰船的信号。

english: The aftermath of the war resulted in pirates gaining control of the sector for themselves. They have since been living here, dormant, surviving from the resources harvested in local asteroid belts and nebulas.
translation: 战争结束后海盗们控制了这个星区。从那时起，他们就蛰伏在这里，靠从当地小行星带和星云中获取的资源生存。

english: Destroying the fortresses would allow us to set up friendly shipyards and take back control of the sector from the pirates.
translation: 摧毁星际堡垒后，我们可以建立己方的船坞，从海盗手中夺回该地区的控制权。

english: Be prepared to be met with heavy resistance if you choose to visit them. I have added their positions to your sector map.
translation: 如果您想去会会他们，请做好遭遇猛烈抵抗的准备。我已将他们的位置添加到您的星区地图中。

english: There's a shuttle on the way to L*X with surveying equipment on-board. It will allow you to scan the area around your ship.
translation: 在前往 L*X 的途中有一艘穿梭机，机上装有勘探设备。它可以让你扫描舰船周围的区域。

english: The forgotten battlefields of the sector may contain new research opportunities, I'd recommend that you explore any derelict ships you detect.
translation: 星区中被遗忘的战场可能蕴藏着新的研究机会，我建议您探索发现的任何废弃船骸。
接收 高级超空间传感器 [*X/*Y]

english: Uncover the history of the new sector.
There's a shuttle on the way to L*X with surveying equipment on-board. The equipment can only be used in the new sector, so you'll need to send a ship through the Stargate to start surveying.
translation: 在前往 L*X 的途中有一艘穿梭机，机上装有勘探设备。这些设备只能在新星区使用，所以你需要派一艘舰船通过星门扫描。
勇闯新星区 第二部分

english: Hello again Captain, the Andromeda Project is very impressed with the samples you've sent them. They want your work on the Stargate to continue.
translation: 舰长，又见面了。仙女座项目对您送来的样本印象深刻，希望您在星门的工作能继续下去。

english: I must warn you, there are rumours that their plan is to take the Stargate fully under their control. They will charge anyone who wants to use it a fortune, preventing any competition and harvesting all the resources in the new galaxy for themselves. They will become more powerful than any entity we have seen before.
translation: 我必须警告您，有传言说他们的计划是要完全控制星门。他们会向任何想使用星门的人收取巨额费用，阻止任何市场竞争，并将新星系的所有资源据为己有。他们的实力将变得前所未有地强大。

english: Please don't let that happen Captain. So much of my life and so many of my projects have been done purely for profit, I can't let this become one of them. As a safeguard against the Andromeda Project, I have installed a back-door that allows you to take control of the Stargate and any devices commanding it.
translation: 舰长，请不要让这种事发生。我的一生参与过许多项目，都是为了纯粹的利益。我不想让这个项目也变成那样。为了防备仙女座项目，我安装了一个后门，可以让直接你控制星门，和任何指挥它的装置。

english: Please use it if they restrict the use of the Stargate for their own gain.
translation: 如果他们为了自己的利益而限制使用星门，请好好利用这个后门。

english: Unfortunately, I've been given some bad news, and I won't be around for much longer. I would like to give you full ownership of the foundry as a thank you for helping me finish this final project.
translation: 不幸的是，我这边有一些坏消息。我可能活不了太长时间了。我想把铸造厂的完整所有权转交给你，以感谢你帮助我完成这个最后的项目。

english: It seems we have completed it just in time.
translation: 看来我们完成得正是时候。

english: This is our final call, Captain. I wish you the best of luck. Thank you again, and goodbye.
translation: 这大概是我们最后一次通话了，舰长。祝你好运。再次感谢，永别了。

english: Captain? Is that you? What are you doing here? It's so good to see you!
translation: 舰长？是你吗？你怎么来了？见到你太好了？

english: Greetings Captain, the Andromeda Project have hired me to work on synthesising crystals produced by a creature I discovered. I've named them tiddlets.
translation: 舰长你好，仙女座项目雇我来合成我发现的一种生物所产生的晶体，我给它们起名叫提德莱特。

english: The Andromeda Project have hired me to work on synthesising the tiddlet crystals that we discovered during our research, and I see they've sent you to provide me with the zeleon.
translation: 仙女座项目雇我来合成我们在之前研究过程中发现的提德莱特晶体，他们让你为我带来了些泽利昂。

english: Upon death, a crystal is formed at the core of the tiddlet. My job is to find a way to produce these crystals without having to farm any tiddlets in the process.
translation: 一旦死亡，提德莱特就会在核心处形成晶体。我的任务就是想办法生产这些晶体。而不需要在生产过程中养殖任何提德莱特。

english: I see you're looking after those tiddlets well! A lot has changed since the tiddlet farm explosion. They are a protected species now and harming them is strictly prohibited.
translation: 我看你把那些提德莱特照顾得很好。自从提德莱特农场爆炸事件以来，事情发生了很多变化。它们现在是受保护物种，严禁伤害它们。

english: The neubidium and zeleon you discovered could be key to my research.
translation: 你发现的纽比迪姆和泽利昂可能是我研究的关键。

english: A lot has changed since the tiddlet farm explosion. They are a protected species now and harming them is strictly prohibited.
translation: 自从提德莱特农场爆炸事件以来，事情发生了很多变化。它们现在是受保护物种，严禁伤害它们。

english: One moment Captain, I've sent a shuttle to receive the resources from you.
translation: 请稍等，舰长。我已经派了一艘穿梭机去运回那些资源。

english: Unfortunately, it looks like you don't have the resources I need for my experiment, when you have the required amount come back and I'll retrieve them from you.
translation: 不幸的是，你好像没有我的实验所需的资源。等你有了所需的资源再回来，我会从你那里运回的。

english: Great! That should be all the resources I need. I'll run the experiments and call you back when I'm done.
translation: 太好了。这应该就是我需要的所有资源了。我会进行实验。完成后再给你回电话。

english: Hello Captain! I have incredible results. Using a highly powered zeleon laser we can charge synthetic crystals made of Neubidium to achieve properties similar to that of the tiddlet crystals.
translation: 舰长您好。我有一个惊人的发现，使用高能泽利昂激光器，我们可以给纽比迪姆合成晶体充电。使其具有与提德莱特晶体类似的特性。

english: This is a fantastic breakthrough but I must warn you that the laser is incredibly radioactive, and will very quickly kill your crew if you don't correctly contain its radiation.
translation: 这是一项重大突破，但我必须提醒你：这种激光具有高强度放射性。如果不正确控制辐射污染，你的船员很快会因此丧命。

english: Come back to my system and I'll send you one of my lasers along with some radiation blockers to keep your crew safe.
translation: 回到我所在的星系来，我会给你送去激光器和一些辐射阻断器，以保证你的船员安全。

english: The next step is to research how this all applies to the Stargate. My hypothesis is that we can use the crystal's energy-density properties to enable jumps much farther than the next sector.
translation: 下一步是研究这一切如何应用于星门。我的假设是，可以利用水晶的能量密度特性，实现超越毗邻星区的星际跃迁。

english: Good luck with your research, Captain.
Deliver a sample of Neubidium Ingots [*X/*Y]
Deliver a sample of Shielded Zeleon [*X/*Y]
Hello again, Captain. Congratulations on completing the latest phase of the Stargate project! We are all very impressed by your commitment and dedication.
translation: 舰长你好，祝贺你完成了星门工程的最新阶段，你的承诺和奉献精神给我们留下了深刻的印象。

english: The project has a new task for you. One of our scientists is investigating a new lifeform called tiddlets.
translation: 星门工程有一项新任务交给你，我们的一位科学家正在研究一种新的生命。叫做“提德莱特”。

english: Upon death, a crystal is formed at the core of the tiddlet. This crystal has extraordinary energy density, which is exactly what we need to increase the hyperspace range of the Stargate.
translation: 提德莱特死亡后，核心形成一个晶体。这种晶体具有极高的能量密度，正是我们增加星门超空间跃迁距离的关键。

english: The Andromeda Project would love to relentlessly farm these tiddlets, but due to recent accidents they have become a strictly protected species. The scientist you're going to visit is researching how to ethically produce their crystals. He believes the new sector's resources will be a breakthrough for his research.
translation: 仙女座项目很想大规模养殖、屠宰这些提德莱特。但由于最近发生的事故，它们成了受严格保护的物种。你要拜访的科学家正在研究如何以道德的方式生产这种晶体，他相信新星区的资源会是他研究的一个突破口。

english: Visit him and provide him a sample of the zeleon.
translation: 拜访这位科学家。并向他提供一份泽利昂样品。
从阿尔忒弥斯号接收新设备
接收 泽利昂能量电池

english: Assist the scientist with his research.

translation: 勇闯新星区 第三部分

english: Thank you for doing that Captain, Artemis will correspond with you directly from now on.
translation: 感谢你做的一切，舰长。从现在起，阿耳特弥斯号将直接与你联络。

english: Wait for Artemis to call you about his experiment
translation: 等待阿耳特弥斯号关于实验情况的消息

english: Payment for sending the test ship
Captain, there are reports that the Andromeda Project are withholding access to the Stargate from any ships that aren't their own.
translation: 舰长，有报告说仙女座项目正在拒绝任何非项目相关的舰船进入星门。

english: My sensors are detecting major fleet movements towards the Stargate, it looks like the Andromeda Project is aiming to secure their control over it.
translation: 我的传感器探测到舰队正向星门集结，看来仙女座项目的目标是确保他们对星门的控制。

english: This is... concerning. Be careful, I don't like the look of this.
translation: 这……令人担忧。小心点，情况不太对劲。

english: Captain, preparations have concluded for the final Stargate test. We are ready to send a ship to the Andromeda Galaxy. Please call us when you are ready.
translation: 舰长最后一次星门测试的准备工作已经完成，我们准备好向仙女座星系发射试验舰了，准备好后请通知我们。

english: Send the test ship to the Andromeda Galaxy
translation: 将试验舰送往仙女座星系
从试验舰接收到的信号

english: The materials you provided to us have been fitted to the Stargate. It is fully functional and ready to test.
translation: 您提供的材料已经安装到星门上，星门功能完整，可以开始执行测试了。

english: The next stage of the project has begun. Our fleet has obtained full control over the Stargate and we are currently in the process of moving our workforce into the new galaxy.
translation: 项目的下一阶段已经开始。我们的舰队已经获得了对星门的完全控制权，目前正在将我们的劳动力转移到新的星系。

english: We will bring prosperity to all those who work with us. Speak to you soon, Captain. We may have some more work for you in the future.
translation: 我们将为所有与我们合作的人带来繁荣。回头见舰长。我们将来可能会有更多的工作给你。

english: This is a monumental moment in the history of our species. If this test is successful the Andromeda Project will be the first entity to send mankind to another galaxy.
translation: 这是我们人类历史上的重要时刻。如果试验成功，仙女座项目就是第一个把人类送往另一个星系的组织。

english: Captain, you will need to begin the test and provide power for the entire journey so our test ship can reach the Andromeda Galaxy. This will require a significant amount of energy, more than what's needed to travel between sectors.
translation: 舰长，您负责启动试航，并为整个旅程提供动力，这样我们的试验舰才能到达仙女座星系。这将需要大量的能量，比跨星区跃迁所需的能量还要多得多。

english: Please begin the test when you are ready.
translation: 请在准备就绪后启动试航。

english: Captain, the Stargate has received a signal from the Andromeda Galaxy.
translation: 舰长，星门收到了来自仙女座星系的信号。

english: The test ship made it. The test was a complete and total success. This is a historic moment for all of mankind.
translation: 试验舰成功了，试航取得了圆满成功，这是全人类的历史性时刻。

english: It couldn't have been done without you Captain. Your industrial expertise and dedication to the project have been invaluable.
translation: 没有舰长您的帮助，我们不可能完成这项任务，你的工业实力和对项目的奉献精神非常宝贵。

english: Thank you Captain, your contribution will not be forgotten. Goodbye for now.
translation: 非常感谢，舰长。我们不会忘记你的贡献，再见。

english: Hello Captain. The newly completed Stargate has put the Andromeda Project in a powerful position to control the flow of resources and people between this galaxy and the Andromeda galaxy.
translation: 舰长你好，新建成的星门使仙女座项目处于有利地位，可以控制本星系和仙女座星系之间的资源和人员流动。
勇闯新星区 第四部分

english: Captain, I'm the chief of security for this sector, and I need your help.
translation: 舰长，我是这个星区的安全主管，我需要你的帮助。

english: All across the sector, there are people in trouble who need our assistance.
translation: 整个星区到处都有陷入困境的人，他们需要我们的帮助。

english: I'm spread too thin. I can't be everywhere. You're more than capable, and I'll be there to offer advice when I can.
translation: 我的力量太分散了，不可能面面俱到，你有足够的实力，我会尽我所能提供建议。

english: If you chose to help, I've marked the locations on your map, as GOLD HIGHLIGHTS.
translation: 如果您愿意提供帮助，我已在您的地图上将这些地点标记为“金色亮点”。

english: My name is Commander Harken, and I'm the Chief of Private Security for the sector.
translation: 我是哈肯指挥官，是本星区的私人安保主管。

english: There is a crisis underway, Captain.  Commercial vessels are going missing, all across the sector.  I suspect foul play, and I need your help to investigate.
translation: 舰长，现在危机四伏，整个区域持续有商船失踪，我怀疑是蓄意行为，需要你协助调查

english: We've recieved reports of a shipwreck nearby. I believe it to be the wreckage of THE INTERSTELLAR PROSPECTOR - a large commercial vessel that went missing yesterday.
translation: 我们收到报告，附近有一艘沉船，我相信那是昨天失踪的大型商船“星际探测器”的残骸。

english: Travel to the shipwreck and look for a Black Box Flight Recorder in the wreckage.  This device will contain a log of their final moments.
translation: 前往沉船位置，在残骸中寻找黑匣子飞行记录仪，这个装置记录了沉船的最后时刻。

english: To collect the flight recorder you'll need to install a DRONE BAY and at least one LOGISTICS DRONE. You can buy them from any Shipyard or Colony.
translation: 要搜寻黑匣子，您需要安装一个无人机舱，和至少一架货运无人机。您可以从任何船坞或殖民地市场购买安装。

english: I've marked the location of the shipwreck on your map as a Gold Highlight.  Good luck, Captain.
translation: 我已在您的地图上将沉船位置标为“金色亮点”，祝你好运，舰长。

english: Thanks to everyone\nwho contributed ship designs
translation: 感谢大家\n投稿的舰船设计
亚历山大·詹姆斯·埃利斯塔

english: My name is Alexander James Elistar, and I'm the chairman and founder of A.J.E Industries.  I have a business proposition for you.  If you would be interested in setting up a production facility for me, I believe with some luck and a good deal of hard work we can both make substantial returns.
translation: 我是亚历山大·詹姆斯·埃利斯塔，是A.J.E 工业公司的创始人兼董事长。我有个商业合作的提议：如果你有兴趣，帮我建设一个生产设施。我相信，只要运气好，再加上勤奋工作，我们都能获得丰厚的回报。

english: Please give me a call to discuss the details.

Captain.  Perhaps you are already aware, but there are big plans underway within this sector.  There are designs to build something... incredible, a transportation system with near infinite range, requiring state of the art manufacturing and industry.
translation: 舰长，也许你已有所了解，这个星区正在进行一项大工程。他们正在设计建造一种……不可思议的东西，一种近乎无限航程的运输系统，需要最先进的制造技术和工业实力。

english: A stargate, big enough for our most massive fleets, shuttling humanity between galaxies as if they were nothing but neighbouring stars.  A new multi-galactic era for humanity.
translation: 一个星门，大到足以容纳我们最庞大舰队的星门。有了它，人类可以穿梭于遥远星系之间，仿佛只是在探访相邻的恒星。人类将迎来一个崭新的星际时代。

english: In all my years I've never known so much capital to be allocated to one project.
translation: 我已从业多年，但从未见过如此多的资金被分配到单一项目中。

english: There is a golden opportunity here for us, but the barriers to entry are high.  I have the assets, the capital, and the facilities that we need to fulfil the Andromeda Project's massive ambitions.
translation: 这是一个千载难逢的机会，但入门门槛很高。我有产业、资金和设施，能够实现仙女座项目的宏伟目标。

english: Sadly, my days of running the shop floor in person are long behind me.  I need a floor manager, somebody who will oversee the day to day operations for me.  And my years of experience have taught me to spot talent when I see it.
translation: 遗憾的是，我亲自管理工厂车间的日子已经一去不复返了。我需要一位车间主管，一个能帮我负责日常运营的人，而多年的经验让我能够一眼发现这方面的人才。

english: Here is my proposal.  I'll provide the factory station, and the seed capital so you are fully funded.  You'll set up the production facility for me, and oversee day to day operations, manufacturing parts for the Andromeda Project to their specifications.
translation: 这就是我的合作提议。我会提供工厂和启动资金，确保你这边资金充足。你要为我建立生产设施，监督日常运作，按照仙女座项目的要求生产部件。

english: And believe me when I say, there will be plenty to go around.
translation: 请相信我，之后我们会有更多合作机会。

english: This is a message for A.J.E FOUNDRY.  We've received your samples and can report that they have passed comfortably within our engineering tolerances.  You are formally approved as licensed industry partners, and may now manufacture all items in our design manifest.
translation: 致 A.J.E 铸造厂：我们已经收到了你提交的样品，并确认其性能完全符合我们的工程公差标准。现正式批准你成为授权工业合作伙伴，并可开始生产我们设计清单中的所有物品。

english: Batches of completed parts may now be submitted to the Andromeda Project through the open Marketplace. You will find our buyers ready to release funds for any parts manufactured to specification.
translation: 现在可以通过公开市场向仙女座项目提交已完成的部件，我们的买家会随时购买任何按规格生产的部件并发放报酬。

english: Thank you for your endeavours, and good luck.
translation: 感谢你们的努力。祝你们好运。

english: Fantastic work, Captain.  I had high expectations, but the process was even more smooth than I hoped.  We've made ourselves known to the Andromeda Project now, but this is just the beginning.
translation: 干得不错，舰长。我原本对这个项目期望很高，不过实际过程比我想象中要顺利得多。我们已经让仙女座项目了解我们的实力了。但这只是个开始

english: The later phases of this project will no doubt be much more involved.  But we are perfectly positioned to capitalise on this opportunity.  And there is a lot of opportunity to be had.
translation: 毫无疑问这个项目的后期将会非常复杂。但我们完全有能力抓住这个机会，我们将会有很多机会。

english: There are individuals behind this mega-project with wealth and resources far beyond my comprehension.  But their ambitions far exceed the capabilities of the other ships and people in this sector.  They are going to need our help.
translation: 这个大型项目背后的人物，拥有我无法理解的财富和资源。但他们的野心远远超出了星区其他舰船和人员的实力，他们会需要我们的帮助。

english: We can take a short break, and I'll give you a call when I'm ready to start work on the next phase of the stargate project. You might want to stop some of your equipment in the meantime, we don't want to waste anything!
translation: 现在可以稍作休息。等准备好开始星门工程下一阶段的工作时，我再给你打电话。在此期间，你可能需要关掉一些设备，我们不想浪费任何东西

english: We need to tidy up the mess, but nothing needs to be wasted.  We can recycle all of the raw materials found on this station.
translation: 我们需要收拾残局，别浪费任何东西。你可以回收利用这个空间站里的所有原材料。

english: There is an industrial smelter among the boxed equipment.  Install it and power it up, then set it to recycling all of the scrap metal.  This will give us an early supply of Metal Ingots.  A critical resource in manufacturing anything.
translation: 盒装设备中有一个工业冶炼机，安装并启动它，然后将其设置为回收废金属。这样我们就能很快获得金属锭，这是制造很多物品的关键资源。

english: If I could draw your attention to this schematic issued by the Andromeda Project.  You can see it's actually quite a simple part.  This is just a structural framework, onto which they'll build everything else.
translation: 请看一下“仙女座项目”发布的图纸。你可以看到这其实是个很简单的部分，只是一个结构框架，他们肯定会在上面建造其他设施。

english: We can manufacture these parts in just two stages out of Metal Ingots.  I've left a boxed Fabricator and an Assembly Table on the station.  Set them up next to each other, ideally near to the Metal Ingots.
translation: 我们只需两道工序就能用金属锭制造出这些部件。我在空间站上留下了一个盒装制造机和一个组装机，把它们摆放在一起，最好靠近金属锭的存放位置。

english: Once they're installed, set the Fabricator to manufacture Frames, then set the Assembly Table to specialise them into finished Stargate Frames.  It's simple stuff, but eventually we will need a huge throughput.
translation: 安装完成后，把制造机设置位制造框架，然后设置组装机将其加工成成品星门框架。这流程简单，不过后续我们将会需要巨大的吞吐量。

english: They want us to provide an initial batch of 10 Stargate Frames, for certification.  They'll inspect our work and we'll be approved as official partners in the Andromeda Project.
translation: 他们要我们提供首批10个“星门框架”以供认证。他们会检查我们的产品，顺利的话我们会被批准成为仙女座项目的正式合作伙伴。

english: It shouldn't take too long.  If you run out of metal, remember you can recycle more of the ruined equipment around the facility.
translation: 这不需要太长时间。如果金属用完了，请记住您可以回收更多设施周围的废旧设备。

english: Call Alexander about the production facility
translation: 给亚历山大打电话，询问生产设施的情况

english: Set Assembly Table to Stargate Frames
translation: 将组装机设置为星门框架
将 制造机 设置为 框架
将 冶炼机 设置为 废金属
在冶炼机附近储存金属锭 [*X/10]
在冶炼机附近储存废金属 [*X/10]

english: Excellent.  Let's have a look at the Manifest that he mentioned, and see what is required next.
translation: 非常好。让我们来看看他提到的清单，看看接下来需要做什么。

english: I knew this would be a very profitable endeavour for us.  The Andromeda Project are so desperately in need of reliable manufacturing facilities that they're paying a fortune.
translation: 我知道这对我们来说是个非常有利的机会，仙女座项目急需可靠的生产设备，他们已经进行了巨量的投入

english: Now, the sales revenue is going to flow through you.  But remember our agreement.  50/50.  I've put a lot of capital in to get us to this point, and I need to start seeing a return.
translation: 现在销售收入将在你这边结算，但别忘了我们的协议，五五分成。我投入了大量资金才让我们走到这一步，需要开始看到回报了

english: Every time you sell a batch of parts to the Andromeda Project, you'll owe me half the revenue.  I'd appreciate it if you'd pay promptly.
translation: 你每卖一批部件给仙女座项目，就需要付给我一半的收入，如果能及时付款我会很感激

english: It looks like it's just a bulk order of the part we already provided.  We need to make 200 more Stargate Frames.  We're already manufacturing them, but we'll need to scale up production or else this will take forever.
translation: 看起来只是他们批量订购之前提供过的部件，我们需要再生产200个星门框架。生产正在进行中，不过我们需要扩大规模，否则会花很长时间。

english: I'm releasing some of the seed money to you.  $600,000 should be enough for you to buy all the equipment we need to scale up.  Remember this isn't a gift.  I still own this station, and all the equipment onboard.
translation: 我再给你一些启动资金资金。60万，应该足够你购买扩大规模所需的所有设备了。记住。这可不是白送的。我仍然是这个空间站和设备的所有者

english: I suggest you buy more Smelters, more Fabricators, and more Assembly Tables.  A couple of each at least.  All that equipment will draw more juice, so you'll need to expand the power network with more Reactors and Batteries to cope.  And you'll need more crew to do the work.
translation: 我建议你购买更多的冶炼机、制造机和组装机，至少每种都要买几个。这些设备都会消耗更多的电力。所以你需要安装更多的反应堆和电池来扩大电力系统，并且还需要招募更多的工人来完成这些工作。

english: If you run out of Metal Ingots, you should be able to buy raw materials from the open Marketplace.  You can usually buy more Scrap Metal, but you'll also find Metallic Minerals for sale which can also be smelted into Metal Ingots.
translation: 如果金属锭用完了，可以在公开市场上购买原材料。通常来说你可以买到很多的废金属，不过买金属矿物冶炼成金属锭也不错。

english: Wonderful news. I'm very happy you've agreed to partner with me on this. My factory space station is in position nearby, ready for us to use as our base of operations.
translation: 太好了，感谢你同意与我合作。我的工厂空间站就在附近，随时可以作为我们的工业基地。

english: This is the A.J.E Foundry.  A wonderful industrial facility, perfect for our needs.  I'll just need to provide you with some access codes so you can assume control of the facility.
translation: 这里是A.J.E 铸造厂，一个很棒的工业设施，非常适合我们的需要。我只需要给你一些密钥，你就可以控制这里了。

english: Look at that.  For years I manufactured engines and FTL drives right here, for every fleet that passed through the sector.  It's really fallen into disrepair.
translation: 请随意参观一下。多年来我一直在这里生产常规引擎和超光速引擎，为每一支经过这里的舰队服务。不过现在已经年久失修

english: Your first job is to send over a skeleton crew, and establish basic power generation and life support.  I had the previous crew box up some of the usable equipment.  You should find the parts you need are already in storage.
translation: 你的第一项工作，是派出骨干船员建立基本的发电和维生系统。我让之前的工人把有用的设备都打包装箱了，你应该能在仓库里找到需要的设备。

english: Efficiency is going to be the key to this facility turning a profit.  Set up a storage zone for scrap metal near to your Smelter, and another for the Metal Ingots that come out.  Our crew will waste a lot less time carrying goods long distances.
translation: 效率将是铸造厂实现盈利的关键。在冶炼机附近设立一个废金属储存区和一个金属锭储存区，这样就能减少工人长途运输物品导致的时间浪费。
询问有关稳定同位素的信息

english: I propose we expand and upgrade the Station into a mining facility.  If we install Engines we can move to a rich asteroid vein, then Mining Lasers and Logistics Drones will give us the capability to harvest the raw materials we need.
translation: 我建议把铸造厂扩建升级为采矿设施。如果安装了引擎，铸造厂就能移动到富饶的小行星矿脉附近，然后采矿激光和货运无人机就能收集所需的原材料。

english: The Stargate Actuators are made on the Assembly Table as normal, and they require a Stargate Frame and a Motor. Motors can be made in fabricators.
translation: 星门驱动器和普通驱动器一样在组装机上生产。它们需要一个星门框架和一个电机，电机可以在制造机上制造。

english: You'll need to mine Metallic Minerals and Copper Minerals, then melt those materials into ingots in an array of Smelters.  You can then fabricate the Motors and Frames, and finally assemble them into Stargate Actuators.
translation: 你需要开采金属矿物和铜矿物，在冶炼炉中将这些材料冶炼成锭，用于制造电机和框架，最后将它们组装成星门驱动器。

english: I'll release some more of the seed capital to cover the costs of the upgrade, but you can take care of the details.
translation: 我会再给你一些启动资金用于升级设施，具体操作细节就交给你了。

english: One last thing, Captain.  I'm sure you've noticed, we aren't exactly surrounded by asteroids here.  I suggest you pair the station up with one of your FTL capable vessels, and jump them both to a suitable mining location.  You can leave the station there to do its work.
translation: 最后一件事，舰长，我相信你已经注意到了，我们这里并没有很多小行星。我建议你把铸造厂和一艘有超光速能力的舰船对接，然后把它们都跃迁到一个合适的采矿地点。你可以把铸造厂留在那里运行。

english: Captain, I think it's time we resumed work on the Stargate contract.  I've had a look ahead and the next phase is a huge step up.  Give me a call when you're ready to continue work.
translation: 舰长，我想是时候继续履行星门项目的合约了。我已经看过，下一阶段将会有重大进展。当你准备好继续接手时，给我打个电话。

english: Excellent work, Captain.  On time and to specification, as usual.  The Andromeda Project have enough of that item now, so you may as well stop production and save the energy and materials.
translation: 干得好，舰长，像之前一样又准时又符合规格。仙女座项目已经拿到足够的部件了，所以你最好停止生产以节省能源和原料。

english: Welcome back, Captain.  I've been taking a look at the schematics published by the Andromeda Project, and the next phase is going to need a huge upgrade to our facilities.
translation: 欢迎回来，舰长。我看了一下仙女座项目公布的图纸，下一阶段我们需要对设施进行大规模升级

english: However, nothing they're asking us to produce is impossible, and I have a strong personal interest in seeing this project completed.  The sooner the better.
translation: 他们要求生产的东西我们都能做，而且我个人非常希望看到这个项目完成，越快越好。

english: The Andromeda Project have released specifications for three different components.  We need to manufacture large quantities of all three to complete this phase, and each will require a different industrial setup.
translation: 仙女座项目公布了三种不同部件的规格。我们需要大量生产这三种部件，才能完成这一阶段的任务，而且每种部件都需要不同的工业设备。

english: The first part is a Stargate Actuator.  This is something we can manufacture in our existing factory station, although it's a more complex production chain.  There won't be nearly enough resources available in the Marketplace, so we'll have to mine the local belt for minerals.
translation: 第一个部件是星门驱动器，我们可以在现有的工厂站制造。不过生产链比较复杂，市场上的原料肯定不够，所以我们必须在当地的小行星带开采矿物。

english: The second part is a chemical compound they're calling Stargate Resin.  It's synthesised in a Chemical Lab, but we first need huge volumes of Metreon Gas.  It's found only in deep space nebulas.
translation: 第二部分是一种化合物，他们称之为星门树脂，是在化学实验室合成的。我们首先需要大量的梅特里昂气体，这种气体只有在深空的星云中才能收集到。

english: My thinking is to buy a suitable fuselage from a Shipyard, and then convert it into a dedicated gas capture and refining facility.  There's a good ship nearby.  You can buy it on my behalf and then set it up, and we'll drop it off in a rich gas cloud and leave it running.
translation: 我的想法是，从船坞购买一个合适的船体，然后将其改装成一个专用的气体采集和提炼设施。附近正好有一艘好船，你可以以我的名义买下它，安装好相应的设备，扔到富含气体的星云里让它运转起来。

english: The final requirement is a few barrels of Stable Isotopes.  These are easily captured during routine FTL travel.  I think you can take care of this one yourself, but if necessary I can talk you through it.
translation: 最后一项要求是几桶稳定同位素。这中东西在常规超光速跃迁中很容易采集到，我想你可以自己解决这个问题。不过如果有需要，我可以指导一下。

english: Time is now of the essence, Captain.  All three parts need to be produced, and I'm in more of a hurry than you may realise.  Keep me informed!
translation: 时间紧迫，舰长。所有三个部分都要制作完成。我比你预想中的还要更着急，有进展请随时同步给我！

english: We need to produce 100 Stable Isotopes. This is a chemical compound we must synthesise and deliver in barrels to the Andromeda Project.
translation: 我们需要生产100个稳定同位素。这是一种化合物，我们必须合成它，然后装到桶里运给仙女座项目。

english: It's not too complex.  It starts with a Hyperspace Scoop, or several ideally, that you can fit to your vessels.  Every time you make an FTL jump you'll collect more as you pass through hyperspace.  You can then pipe those isotopes into a Refinery and convert them into Stable Isotopes.
translation: 其实并不复杂。首先在舰船上安装若干超空间采集器。每次进行超光速跃迁，你都会在通过超空间时收集到很多超空间同位素，然后将这些同位素输送到精炼厂，将其转化为稳定同位素。

english: The final stage is to install a Loader or two, and set them to 'UNLOAD'.  This will instruct your crew to barrel up the stable isotopes and store them in the cargo hold so you can easily sell them on the Marketplace.
translation: 最后一步是安装一两个装载器并将其设置为“卸载”，这样你的船员会把稳定同位素装进桶里，存在货舱里，之后就可以很轻松地在市场上出售它们了。
开始收集梅特里昂气体 [*X/100]
开始收集超空间同位素 [*X/100]

english: OPTIONAL: Install engines in the A.J.E Foundry
translation: 可选：在 A.J.E 铸造厂安装引擎

english: Sell your manufactured parts to submit them to the Stargate project
translation: 出售你制造的部件，将它们提交给星门工程

english: Take control of the A.J.E Foundry
Transport the Gas Collector to a Nebula
Begin unloading barrels of Stable Isotopes [*X/10]
translation: 开始卸载桶装稳定同位素 [*X/10]

english: There is a ship for sale here that's perfect for our gas collection enterprise.  Let's buy it and add it to the fleet.
translation: 这里有一艘船要出售，非常适合我们的气体开采项目把它买下来加入舰队。

english: Gas collection is a slow process.  Our aim should be to place this vessel within a dense metreon nebula, slowly absorbing the gas and refining it over time.  Once we're in the nebula we won't be able to easily upgrade the ship, so we'll want to set it up as much as possible in advance.
translation: 气体采集是一个缓慢的过程。我们的目标应该是把这艘舰船停在一个稠密的梅特里昂星云中，慢慢地吸收气体并进行提炼。一旦进入星云，我们就无法轻易升级这艘舰船，所以要尽可能提前做好准备。

english: I'll send over more seed money and you can outfit the ship as you see best.
translation: 我会为你提供更多的启动资金，你可以按照自己的想法来配置舰船。

english: The process of making Stargate Resin starts with a Gas Collector bringing in the Metreon Gas.  We then pipe that into a Refinery to produce Refined Metreon, then into a Chemical Lab where the Stargate Resin can be synthesised.
translation: 星门树脂的制造，首先是用气体采集器采集梅特里昂气体，然后将其输送到精炼厂生产精炼梅特里昂，再输送到化学实验室合成星门树脂。

english: You'll need all of that equipment to get started.  I'd recommend Collectors, Refineries, and Chemical Labs, four each at least.  You'll also want Storage Tanks to buffer the intermediate products, and an upgrade to the Power Grid.
translation: 你需要以上所有设备才能开始工作。我建议准备气体采集器、精炼厂和化学实验室至少各四个，并且还需要一些储罐来缓冲中间产物。另外还要升级电力系统。

english: You may need to shop around a bit, if the local trade post doesn't have everything you need.
translation: 如果当地市场没有你需要的所有设备，可能需要到别处采购。

english: Once the ship is ready, pair it up with one of your FTL capable vessels, and jump into a nearby nebula to begin the process of gas collection.
translation: 舰船准备就绪后，将其与一艘具有超光速能力的舰船对接，跃迁到附近的星云里开始收集气体。

english: There's a situation brewing at our factory in the asteroid belt.  You'd better take a look.
translation: 我们在小行星带的工厂出了点状况，你最好去看看。

english: Raymond.  It's been quite a while.  How have you been?
translation: 雷蒙德，好久不见，最近怎么样？

english: Captain, I'll take care of this.  My private security are on their way.  I'll keep him talking, but there's no need for bloodshed.
translation: 舰长，这件事我亲自处理吧。我的私人保镖已经在路上了，我会和他谈的，没必要流血

english: You were compensated for your work Raymond.  You signed the contract.
translation: 你已经拿到工作补偿了，雷蒙德，你签了合同

english: Is he in there?  Alexander?  Where is he?
translation: 他在里面吗？亚历山大？他在哪儿？

english: I'm not going to ask again.  I demand to speak to Alexander Elistar.  Immediately!  I am armed!
translation: 最后再说一遍，我要求和亚历山大-伊利斯达通话，马上！我可是带了枪的！

english: How have I been?  You know exactly how I've been.  I'm here to collect my share.
translation: 我过得怎么样？你知道我过得怎么样，我是来拿回我那一份的。

english: The designs were mine.  The patents were mine!  All of this, it's all built on my work.
translation: 设计是我的，专利是我的，所有这一切都是建立在我的作品之上的。

english: For pennies!  You screwed me, and now it's worth millions!
translation: 才分给我那么点钱！你糊弄我呢！现在那东西值几百万！

english: I want my share.  Deal me in.  10% ownership of this new venture of yours.  I'm being reasonable, but the law is on my side.  Don't make me shut you down Alexander.
translation: 我要拿回我的那一份。必须把我算进去，新企业10%的股份。我已经很讲道理了，而且法律也站在我这边。别逼我让你关门大吉，亚历山大。

english: I'll be coming for you Alexander, and this time I'm not asking for 10%. I want it all.
translation: 我会来找你的，亚历山大。这次我要10%了，我要全部。

english: This is Private Security vessel DOGMA, under exclusive contract to A.J.E Industries.
translation: 这里是私人安保舰队 DOGMA，隶属于A.J.E 工业公司的独家安保合同。

english: You are operating in a dangerous and threatening manner in the vicinity of an A.J.E corporate facility.
translation: 你的行为很危险，已经对A.J.E.工业公司的设施造成威胁。

english: You are ordered to stand down and withdraw immediately.
translation: 我方命令你立即停止行动并离开此处。

english: We are authorised by deep space convention in the use of deadly force in defense of our client's assets.
translation: 深空公约已授权我们使用致命武力保护客户的资产。

english: THERE WILL BE NO FURTHER WARNING.

I'm sure you've noticed, we're making a small fortune from all of this.  Truth be told, I'm not really doing this for the revenue.  I already have more than I can ever spend.  But I'm running out of time.  The Doctors have made that clear to me.
translation: 我相信你们能注意了，我们从中赚一笔小钱。说实话我这么做并不是为了收入，我的钱已经多得花不完了。但我的时间不多了，医生们已经跟我说得很清楚。

english: I've been around quite a few years.  I've had my share of success, built my empire, my fortune.  I live a comfortable life.  But I find myself thinking more and more about what I want to do with the time I have left.
translation: 我在这一行摸爬滚打了好几年，取得了成功，建立了帝国，赚取了财富。我的生活很舒适，但我却越来越常在想，余下的人生该用来做些什么。

english: I just want to be the first at something huge.  The first person to visit another galaxy.  Alexander James Elistar.  That's a name that people would remember.
translation: 我只想成为某件大事的第一人。第一个访问另一个星系的人，亚历山大-詹姆斯-埃利斯塔，人们会这样记住我的名字。

english: Resume work on the Stargate with X
translation: 与 X 恢复星门的工作

english: We are all done, Captain.  That was an incredible display of industrialised power.  There's nobody even close to us in the Marketplace, and we basically are the Andromeda Project.  They need us now.
translation: 我们都完成了舰长  这真是工业化力量的惊人展示  市场上没人比得上我们 我们就是仙女座项目  他们现在需要我们

english: I'm going to take a short break from the project, I trust you'll be able to do the next couple of stages on your own.
translation: 我将从项目中稍作休息我相信你们能独立完成接下来的几个阶段。

english: You should know that my Doctors continue to bring me bad news.  Each time I talk to them... well, I don't know how long I have left.  This will be my final project.  I just hope I have time to finish it.
translation: 你应该知道我的医生不断给我带来坏消息。  每次我和他们谈话......我都不知道自己还能活多久。  这将是我的最后一个项目  我只希望能有时间完成它
深空实业家 第二部分

english: I'm disappointed, Captain. You're backing out after all the investment I've put into this project?
translation: 舰长，我很失望。我为这个项目投入了这么多，你却要退出。

english: You will lose access to all the ships I've provided, are you sure you want to do this?
translation: 你将无法使用我提供的所有船只，确定要这样做吗？

english: How dare you! I still have the access keys. You will no longer be a part of this enterprise.
translation: 你怎么能这样！控制权还在我手上，你将不再是我企业的一员。

english: Thank you, Captain.  I appreciate the prompt payment.
translation: 谢谢你，舰长。感谢你的及时付款
付款已收到，谢谢你，舰长。

english: I've received my share.  Excellent work, Captain.
translation: 我已经收到了我的分成。干得好，舰长。

english: Captain, I can see you've sold a batch of Stargate parts, but I've received no corresponding payment.  We agreed to split all revenue 50/50.  This setup is costing me a fortune and I need to start making my return.  Please transfer the funds to my account as soon as possible.
translation: 舰长，我看到你已经卖了一批星门部件，但我没有收到相应的付款。我们说好了五五分账的，这个铸造厂消耗了我大量的资金，我需要开始回本了。请尽快把钱转到我的账户上。

english: Captain, I was sure I'd made our agreement clear.  Don't forget who owns this station, and all the equipment onboard.  50/50 was what we agreed.
translation: 舰长，我想我已经说得很清楚了，别忘了谁是这个铸造厂站和设备的所有者，我们的协议是五五分成。

english: Captain, I was sure I'd made our agreement clear.  Don't forget who owns this station, and all the equipment onboard.  50/50 was what we agreed.
translation: 舰长，我想我已经说得很清楚了，别忘了谁是这个铸造厂站和设备的所有者，我们的协议是五五分成。

english: I thought I could trust you.  Pay me the money you owe, immediately, or I will be forced to escalate.
translation: 我以为你是个讲信用的人，马上把你欠的钱还我，否则我将采取更激进的手段。

english: Captain, this is your final warning.  You are now willfully withholding sales revenue that is legally mine.  If you don't pay what you owe immediately I will have no choice but to terminate our agreement, seize control of my station, and recover any financial losses directly from you.
translation: 船长，这是我最后警告，你现在相当于故意扣留了属于我的合法收入。如果你不立即偿还欠款，我将别无选择，只能终止我们的协议，夺回铸造厂控制权，并直接向你追回之前所有的经济损失。

english: Every colonised planet you visit will have civilians in need of evacuation.
translation: 你访问的每个殖民地，都会有需要撤离的平民。

english: You will need to expand your habitation deck and even upgrade to a larger ship eventually.
translation: 您需要扩大居住甲板，最终升级成更大的舰船。

english: Some of our scientists don't believe the void collapse can ever be stopped.
translation: 我们的一些科学家不相信虚空坍塌会被阻止。

english: If that's true then billions of people are going to need evacuation from our home planets.
translation: 如果这是真的，那么数十亿人需要从我们的母星撤离。

english: There has never been an evacuation of so many people at once.
translation: 以往从来没有同时疏散这么多人。

english: And we don't even know where we can go that will be safe.
translation: 我们甚至不知道去哪里才安全。

english: Next bonus upon evacuation of *X civilians : $*Y.
translation: 下一阶段奖励：撤离 *X 平民可获得 $*Y 。
撤离*X 平民。资金奖励 $*Y 。

english: You have evacuated *X civilians from doomed home worlds.
translation: 你已将 *X 平民从注定毁灭的母星撤离。

english:
STOCKPILE

When ticked, the produced items will be immediately unloaded into any cargo storage area, stockpiling the item.

If unticked, the produced item will remain until it is used somewhere, or until there is specific cargo space available.
translation:
堆积

如果勾选，生产出来的物品会立即卸载到任何可用的储存空间，将物品堆积起来。

如果不勾选，生产出来的物品会一直保留着，直到其他地方有用到，或有相应的储存空间。

english: This will be the final journey of your fleet.\nBe prepared for a long journey to the Andromeda galaxy, and save as many as you can!
translation: 这将是你们舰队的最后一次航行，\n请做好前往仙女座星系的长途航行准备，并尽可能拯救更多的人
警告 - 已部署无人机*X

english: Creative Mode will end when you jump to hyperspace
translation: 跳转到超空间后，创造模式将自动关闭

english: Ship cannot enter hyperspace with your fleet
translation: 舰船无法随舰队进入超空间

english: Ship is controlled by interstellar logistics
Ship needs either hull or scaffolding to be brought into hyperspace
translation: 舰船需要船体或脚手架才能进入超空间

english: This equipment can not function properly when installed in this position.
translation: 安装在此位置时该设备无法正常工作。
所有船只必须进入星门

english: WARNING - LAST FTL CHARGE\nCANNOT BUY AT DESTINATION
translation: 警告 - 剩余最后一份跃迁燃料\n目的地无法购买
警告 - 正在收集任务物品

english: Allow crew members to load this crate.\n\nIf disabled then only robot arms can load.
translation: 允许船员装载此箱子。\n\n如果禁用则只有机械臂可以装载。

english: Allow crew members to unload from this crate.\n\nIf disabled then only robot arms can unload.
translation: 允许船员从该箱子卸货。\n\n如果禁用则只有机械臂可以卸货。

english: The number of items or stacks of the chosen type that is being stored.
translation: 正在存储的所选类型的物品或堆叠数量。

english: The type that the storage crate will be storing.
You should repair the damage to your ship at a SHIPYARD.
translation: 您应该在船坞修复舰船的损伤。
警告 - *X 名船员仍在太空中
警告 - 星区扫描将被取消

english: You must travel to a Colony or Shipyard to trade
translation: 你必须前往殖民地或船坞才能进行交易
警告 - 交易请求未完成
警告 - 交易欠款未还清

english: With Andromeda HQ captured, Cmdr Harken and the Intergalactic Security Council will dismantle the Andromeda Project conglomerate and regain control of the Stargate, for the benefit of all mankind.  A new chapter has begun, as mankind expands beyond our home galaxy and into the future.
translation: 随着仙女座总部被占领，哈肯中校和星际安全委员会将为了全人类的利益，摧毁仙女座项目集团，重新夺回星门的控制权。新的篇章已经开启，人类将走出银河系，走向未来。

translation: 通过星门前往 S*X 星系

translation: 星系 S*X 没有任何 R*Y 可供开采

Stargate is not ready for jump
translation: 星门尚未做好跃迁准备

translation: 星系 S*X 没有贸易站

translation: 隐藏此订单的其他选项

english: Create epic space battles between fleets of ships and watch the carnage unfold.
translation: 在舰队之间创建史诗般的太空战役见证毁灭的降临。

english: Create epic space battles between fleets of ships and watch the carnage unfold.
translation: 在舰队之间创建史诗般的太空战役见证毁灭的降临。

english: You have unlimited resources to build any ship you want
translation: 拥有无限资源，建造你心目中的舰船

english: Build a flight-ready ship in Creative Mode to unlock
translation: 在创造模式中建造一艘适航的舰船以解锁

english: You are free to persue any career at your own pace. No anomaly, no stargate.
translation: 你可以按照自己的节奏自由发展。没有异常没有星门。

english: Embark on a new journey through our story-driven sci-fi episodes
translation: 通过故事驱动的科幻章节踏上新的旅程

english: Your aim is to research and build a stargate to Andromeda
translation: 你的目标是研究并建造通往仙女座的星门

english: Complete any story episode in 'Boldly Go' to unlock
translation: 完成“勇往直前”中的任意章节以解锁

english: Stay one step ahead of a devastating anomaly, for as long as you can
translation: 在毁灭性的异常吞噬一切之前尽可能地逃离
新游戏 - 普拉克西斯
新游戏 - 大型货运船

english: Forge your own path through story driven episodes all around the sector, and take part in the construction of a galactic mega project
translation: 在星区中通过故事驱动的章节开辟自己的道路，并参与银河系巨型工程的建设

english: Take part in the construction of a galactic megaproject - a STARGATE with enough range to reach our nearest neighbouring galaxy ANDROMEDA
translation: 参与建造银河系巨型工程——星门，其传送距离足以抵达我们最近的邻近星系仙女座

english: Stay one step ahead of a devastating anomaly that consumes everything in its path, and save as many as you can before it's too late
translation: 在吞噬一切的毁灭性异常到来前先行一步，在为时已晚前尽可能拯救更多人

english: Prepare your ship and crew for the upcoming battle!\nUnpausing the game will begin combat.
translation: 让你的舰船和船员为即将到来的战斗做好准备\n取消暂停战斗将会开始。

english: OPTIONAL: Use the ship editor to prepare
translation: 可选：使用舰船编辑器准备

english: We have marked the location of the hostile forces on your map. Good hunting.
translation: 我们已经在你们的地图上标出了敌对势力的位置，祝你狩猎愉快

english: All hostile forces have been destroyed. Total payment $*X.
translation: 所有敌对势力已被摧毁，付款总额 $*X.

english: You have located the hostile forces! Destroy them immediately.
translation: 你已找到敌军，请立即消灭他们。

english: There is a small fleet of hostile ships operating illegally at a nearby star system in this sector.
translation: 这个星区附近的一个恒星系统中，有一小队敌对舰船在进行非法活动。

english: They have been harassing trade and humanitarian ships for too long.
translation: 他们骚扰贸易和人道主义船只已经太久了。

english: Travel to the system, engage them in combat and destroy them.
translation: 前往该星系，战斗并消灭他们。

english: You have destroyed *X hostiles out of *Y
The remaining hostile forces have escaped.
The hostile ships are located at system S*X.
Pirate forces have created a dangerous minefield in a busy shipping lane.
translation: 海盗部队在繁忙的航道上制造了一个危险的雷区。

english: Their aim appears to be to cripple any trade ships that come too close, then rob the stranded ships of valuable cargo.
translation: 它们的目的似乎是要摧毁任何靠得太近的商船，然后抢走搁浅船只上的贵重货物。

english: Travel to the system and destroy the minefield, before the pirate forces show up.
translation: 在海盗部队出现之前，前往该星系并摧毁雷区。

english: You will need a weapon system to destroy the mines from a distance.
translation: 你需要一个武器系统来远距离摧毁雷区。

english: Reports suggest there are *X ships in the hostile fleet, hiding out in star system *Y.
translation: 报告显示敌对舰队中有 *X 艘舰船躲藏在星系 *Y 中。

english: You will require an armed combat vessel to accept this mission.
translation: 您需要一艘武装战舰才能接受这项任务。
被摧毁的 *X/*Y 敌对势力

english: Attack and destroy hostile pirate gang
translation: 攻击并摧毁敌对海盗团伙
摧毁敌对雇佣军的武器平台
攻击和摧毁流氓战斗机

english: All cargo has been supplied. Good luck.
translation: 所有货物已送达，祝你好运

english: I've got *X boxes of supplies that need delivering.
translation: 我有 *X 箱物资需要运送。

english: The destination is *Y Sector Jumps away, in Sector *X.
translation: 目的地在 *X 星区，需要 *Y 次星区跃迁。

english: The destination is in this Sector, at Star System S*X.
translation: 目的地位于本星区 S*X 星系。

english: The remaining *X items of cargo are unaccounted for.
translation: 其余 *X 件货物下落不明。

english: It is too late - you will no longer be paid for the remaining cargo.
translation: 时间已过，交付剩余货物将不再获得报酬。

english: Received *X out of *Y items. Total payment due $*Z.
translation: 从 *Y 项目中收到 *X 。应付款总额 $*Z 。

english: A shuttle is on route to you now with the supplies.
translation: 一艘穿梭机正运送物资前往你处。

english: These goods are required immediately. You'll have just *X minutes. (+50% pay)
translation: 货物急需，你只有 *X 分钟时间，+50% 报酬

english: You have just *X seconds remaining to make the delivery!
translation: 你只剩下 *X 秒来完成交付

english: Courier mission: Deliver cargo to nearby system
translation: 运输任务：向附近星系运送货物

english: Received *X out of *Y items, but the time limit has now expired.
A shuttle is on its way to collect the cargo.
translation: 一架穿梭机正在去取货物的路上。

english: Some of the cargo has been delivered to the wrong location. You will not be paid.
translation: 部分货物送错了地点，您将无法获得付款。

english: This mission has been assigned a difficulty rating of *X.
All ships must pass basic flight ready certification before being allowed on operations.
translation: 所有船只必须通过基本飞行准备认证，才可投入运营。

english: A ship requires each of the following capabilities in order to be certified 'Flight Ready':
translation: 要获得“飞行就绪”认证，舰船必须具备以下各项能力

english: Engines for propulsion.  Test fire your engines (From the TACTICAL view) to certify them.
translation: 用于推进的引擎，试射引擎从战术视角对其进行认证。

english: An FTL Drive capable of Hyperspace jumps
translation: 能进行超空间跃迁的引擎

english: An FTL Drive.  Test your new FTL engine by making a jump to the destination marked on the map.
translation: 一个跃迁引擎，跳转到地图上标记的目的地以进行测试。

english: Life support to make the interior habitable [*X%]
translation: 使内部适宜居住的维生系统 [*X%]

english: Life support to make the cabin breathable.  Use an Airduct to pressurise the cabin, connected to an Oxygen Loader to supply the air.
translation: 维生系统提供可供呼吸的空气，使用通风机给机舱加压并连接氧气装载器来提供空气。

english: Test the engines from the TACTICAL screen
A reactor to generate power. Use a Fuel Loader to pipe fuel into the Reactor.
translation: 一个用于发电的反应堆，使用燃料装载器将燃料输送到反应堆。

english: Make your new ship ready for flight
translation: 让你的新舰船做好航行准备

english: We have marked the location of the fortress on your map. Good luck, Captain.
translation: 我们已经在你们的地图上标出了星际堡垒的位置，祝你好运，舰长

english: Hostiles have set up a fortress within the sector. It appears to be where they are fabricating their ships.
translation: 敌人在这个区域建立了一个星际堡垒，他们似乎正在那里建造舰船。

english: The fortress is giving them significant power across the sector and must be dealt with.
translation: 星际堡垒赋予了他们在整个地区的巨大控制力，必须加以解决。

english: Travel to the fortress, destroy it, and eliminate any remaining hostiles
translation: 前往星际堡垒，摧毁它并消灭剩余的敌人
星际堡垒攻击取得了成功。

english: We've marked the asteroid belt location on your map.
translation: 我们已经在地图上标出了小行星带的位置。

english: There is huge demand for FTL fuel cells, to power the evacuation ships.
translation: 超光速燃料电池可以为撤离船提供动力，需求量巨大。

english: We can manufacture FTL Fuel, but we need Tilium ore that can only be found in certain asteroid belts.
translation: 我们可以生产超光速燃料，但需要提利姆矿石，而提利姆矿石只能在某些小行星带找到。

english: Luckily there is just such an asteroid belt nearby, within this sector, in system S*X.
translation: 幸运的是，附近就有这样一个小行星带，位于本星区的 S*X 星系。

english: The nearest asteroid belt is in the next sector.
translation: 最近的小行星带在下一个星区。

english: Then drop the Ore off at any trading post to collect payment.
translation: 然后将矿石送到任何一个贸易站换取收款。

english: You have *X Tilium ore on this ship (We need *Y)
translation: 你的船上已有 *X 提利姆矿石（我们需要*Y）

english: WARNING: There are hostile forces camped out near the asteroid belt. (+50% pay)
translation: 警告：小行星带附近有敌军驻扎。(+50% 报酬）

english: There is no more Tilium on board your ship.
translation: 你的船上已经没有提利姆矿石了。

english: WARNING: There are reports of a meteor shower in that system. (+50% pay).
translation: 警告：有报告称该星系出现流星雨。(+50% 报酬）。

english: We have received *X Tilium out of a total of *Y. Total payment due $*Z.
translation: 我们已收到 *X 提利姆矿石，总金额为 *Y 。待支付的酬金总额为 $*Z 。

english: ==> The Tilium must first be refined in a Smelter prior to delivery. <==
translation: ==> 交付之前，必须先把提利姆矿石放到冶炼机中进行提炼。<==

english: Then refine the mined ore in a Smelter.
translation: 然后在冶炼机对开采出的矿石进行提炼。

english: This contract requires a suitable mining vessel, equipped with Mining Lasers and Logistics Drones.
translation: 这份合约需要一艘合格的采矿船，配备了采矿激光和货运无人机。

english: Return to a colony or shipyard system to deliver the Tilium.
translation: 返回殖民地或船坞，交付提利姆矿石。

english: We've dispatched a shuttle to collect the Tilium Ore.
translation: 我们已经派出了一艘穿梭机去采集提利姆矿石了。

english: Travel to the asteroid belt and extract *X Tilium ore.
translation: 前往小行星带，获取 *X 提利姆矿石。
采矿合约：获取关键矿物

english: That's it, all passengers are on board your ship. Travel safe commander.
translation: 就这样，所有乘客都上船了。祝你一路顺风，指挥官。

english: *X out of *Y passengers are on board.
There is a group of *X civilians who are looking for safe transit.
translation: 有 *X 平民正在寻找安全的过境交通方式。

english: Their destination is *Y Sector Jumps away, in Sector *X.
translation: 他们的目的地是第 *X 星区，需要经过 *Y 次星区跃迁。

english: Their destination is in this Sector. Drop them off at Star System S*X.
translation: 他们的目的地就在这个星区，将他们送到 S*X 星系。

english: Transport the passengers to the destination
*X passengers did not arrive at the destination safely.
translation: *X 乘客没有安全抵达目的地。

english: *X passengers out of *Y have made it safely to their destination. Total payment due $*Z.
translation: *X / *Y 乘客已安全抵达目的地，待支付酬金总额为 $*Z

english: Your ship will need enough free cabins in your habitation deck.
translation: 你舰船的居住甲板上，需要有足够的空闲舱室。

english: They are on their way to you now and will dock shortly.
translation: 它们正在来的路上，很快就会对接。

english: Welcome! We've dispatched a shuttle to collect the passengers.
translation: 欢迎光临！我们已经派了一艘穿梭机去接乘客。

english: Passengers have been dropped off at completely the wrong destination! You will not be paid for them.
translation: 乘客下车的目的地完全错误，您将无法获得赔偿。

english: (The client is offering *Xx more money than usual)
translation: (客户提供的报酬比平时高出*Xx)

english: (The client is offering *X% more money than usual)
translation: (客户提供的报酬比平时高出*X%)

english: You have *X stacks of R*Y available for transfer within your fleet (We need *Z)
translation: 你目前有 *X / R*Y 组，可在舰队内转运（我们需要 *Z）

english: We have an urgent requirement for *X stacks of R*Y.
You can choose to manufacture the product from raw materials, or acquire it through some other means.
translation: 您可以选择用原材料生产物品，也可以通过其他方式获得。

english: The market price for these items would be $*X.
translation: 这些物品的市场价格为 $*X 。

english: (We are offering *X% above market rate due to urgent requirement).
translation: (由于需求紧急，我们提供比市场价高出 *X% 的价格。

english: There is no more R*X available within your fleet.
We have received *X stacks of R*Y out of a total of *Z.
translation: 我们已收到 *X / *Z 组 R*Y。

english: All of the refugees are on board. We wish you the best of luck, commander.
translation: 所有难民都上船了。祝你一路顺风，指挥官。

english: We have *X civilians living here who have nowhere to go, and no way to escape the void before it arrives.
translation: 这里住着 *X 平民，他们无处可去，也无法在虚空到来之前逃离。

english: Find a place for them in your fleet, look after them, and we will be forever grateful.
translation: 在你们的舰队中为它们找个位置照顾好它们我们将永远感激不尽。

english: *X out of *Y passengers are on board. Total payment $*Z.
translation: *X / *Y 名乘客已登船，酬金总额为 $*Z

english: Your ship will need enough free cabins in your habitation deck.
translation: 你舰船的居住甲板上，需要有足够的空闲舱室。

english: Take permanent refugees into your care
Contract requires at least *X free cabins
translation: 合约要求至少有 *X 个空闲舱位

english: You require a Combat Rating of at least *X
translation: 需要战斗等级至少达到 *X
合约要求配备武装战舰

english: You require a Humanitarian Rating of at least *X
translation: 需要人道主义等级至少达到 *X

english: You require an Industry Rating of at least *X
translation: 需要工业等级至少达到 *X

english: You require a Logistics Rating of at least *X
translation: 需要货运等级至少达到 *X

english: We've marked the location of the wrecked ship on your map. Please hurry!
translation: 我们已经在地图上标出了失事船只的位置，请抓紧时间！

english: All crew have been rescued from the ship! Drop them off at the nearest starbase or colony.
translation: 所有船员都已从舰船上获救，将他们送到最近的星港或殖民地。

english: A ship has become stranded with engine troubles, and the crew need an immediate rescue.
translation: 一艘船因引擎故障而搁浅，船员需要立即救援。

english: The damaged ship is nearby in system S*X. Hurry!
translation: 受损船只就在附近的 S*X 星系，请尽快行动！

english: The ship is in the next sector.
There are *X crew on board, and they must be dropped off safely somewhere nearby.
translation: 船上有*X 名船员必须将他们安全送到附近的某个地方。

english: There are hostile forces in the area. (+50% pay)
translation: 该地区有敌对势力。(+50% 报酬

english: There are reports of a meteor shower in the area. (+25% pay).
translation: 有报告称该地区将出现流星雨。(+25%报酬。

english: *X crew out of *Y have made it to safety. Total payment due $*Z.
translation: *X / *Y 人已安全抵达。待支付酬金总额为 $*Z

english: You will require at least four manoeuvring thrusters to successfully dock with the damaged ship.
translation: 你至少需要四个机动推进器，才能成功与受损的船只对接。

english: *X crew out of *Y have been rescued and are on board.
The ship is spinning out of control. It will be very challenging to dock. (+25% pay)
translation: 这艘船正在失控，与其对接难度非常高。（+25% 报酬）

english: The ship is moving - you will need some skill to dock safely. (+25% pay)
translation: 这艘船在移动，与其对接有一定难度。（+25% 报酬）

english: The ship engines will explode very soon. (+25% pay).
translation: 这艘船的引擎很快就会爆炸。(+25% 报酬）

english: The ship engine core will explode in just *X seconds!!
translation: 这艘船的引擎核心将在 *X 秒内爆炸
从失事船只中营救平民

english: Hostile forces have taken up residence within this sector. They are hindering our evacuation efforts and stealing vital resources.
translation: 敌对势力已经在这一星区占据了一席之地，他们正在妨碍我们的撤离工作，并不断窃取重要资源。

english: We want you to pay a visit to each location marked HOSTILES on the map.
translation: 我们希望你前往地图上标有 “敌对势力” 的每个地点。

english: Terminate any enemy vessels you find at those locations.
translation: 终结在这些地点发现的任何敌舰。

english: A payment of $*X will be made after each location is cleared, for a total of $*Y.
translation: 每个地点清空敌人后，我们将支付 $*X，总计 $*Y 。
将 *X 从 *Y 星系中清除

english: You have destroyed the enemy forces in system S*X. Payment of $*Y is coming your way.
translation: 你已消灭 S*X 星系的敌军。酬金 $*Y 即将到账。

english: SECTOR OBJECTIVE: Destroy all hostile forces
translation: 星区目标：消灭所有敌对势力

english: *X passengers out of *Y have made it safely to their destination. Total payment $*Z.
translation: *X / *Y 乘客已安全抵达目的地，酬金总额为 $*Z

english: There are *X civilians stranded in the sector, with no means to escape the coming catastrophe.
translation: 有*X 名平民被困在这一区域无法逃离即将到来的灾难。

english: Travel to their star systems and pick them up, and house them temporarily in your fleet.
translation: 前往他们的星系，把他们接过来，暂时安置在你的舰队中。

english: Transport them safely to the next sector and drop them off at the first starbase to complete the objective.
translation: 将他们安全运送到下一个星区的任一星港以完成目标。

english: *X civilians have been killed during the evacuation.
translation: *X 平民在撤离过程中丧生。

english: Thank you for your efforts commander.
*X passengers did not arrive at the destination safely.
translation: *X 乘客没有安全抵达目的地。

english: The total payment for rescuing all *X civilians will be $*Y
translation: 营救所有 *X 平民的总酬金为 $*Y

english: *X out of *Y civilians have been collected.
Your ship will need enough free cabins in your habitation deck.
translation: 你舰船的居住甲板上，需要有足够的空闲舱室。

english: (You can expand your hab deck at a Shipyard using the Ship Editor)
translation: （你可以使用舰船编辑器，在船坞扩展你的居住甲板）
星区目标：疏散受困平民

english: The Jumpgate is damaged, and must be repaired and re-aligned.
translation: 星门已损坏，必须进行修复并重新校准。

english: The Jumpgate at the end of this sector has some requirements before it can be used.
translation: 本星区末端的星门在使用前需要满足一些条件。

english: A fleet of hostile ships is attempting to blockade the jumpgate and extort money from ships passing through.
translation: 一支敌对舰队正试图封锁星门，向通过的船只勒索钱财。

english: You'll need to clear them out before we can safely activate the jumpgate.
translation: 在我们能安全启动星门之前，你需要先清除他们。

english: We need some maintainence supplies before the jumpgate can be used.
translation: 在使用星门之前，我们需要一些维护物资。

english: The Jumpgate is now ready for use.
Please maneuver all fleet ships into the jumpgate and align for transit.
translation: 请将舰队所有舰船驶入星门，并对准以进行传送。

english: Thank you, the Jumpgate has been repaired and re-aligned.
translation: 谢谢，星门已修复并重新校准。

english: There is a TRANSIT FEE to pay for use of the Jumpgate. This money covers the operating costs and energy consumption of such a massive facility.
translation: 使用星门需支付通行费。这笔费用用于支付此庞大设施的运营成本及能源消耗。

english: Thank you, payment received for transit.
We've marked the location of the ship on your map. Please hurry!
translation: 我们已在地图上标记了该船位置，请抓紧时间！

english: The vessel is under attack! Fight off the hostile ships before it's too late.
translation: 该船正遭受攻击，在为时已晚前击退敌舰。

english: Investigate a distress call in system S*X.
translation: 调查S*X 星系中的求救信号。

english: A commercial vessel is under attack from an unknown hostile enemy. They have already taken heavy damage.
translation: 一艘商船正遭受不明敌军袭击，且已严重受损。

english: Unfortunately the ship has been destroyed.
translation: 不幸的是，该船已被摧毁。

english: *X of the *Y enemy ships have been destroyed.
Thank you, Captain! We would never have survived without your assistance.
translation: 谢谢您，舰长！如果没有你的帮助，我们绝对无法幸存。

english: If you'd be interested, we'd be honoured to join forces with your fleet.
translation: 如果您同意，我们将很荣幸加入你的舰队。

english: To any vessel, we are under attack!  Please help, we won't last much longer!
translation: 呼叫所有船只，我们正遭受攻击！请立即支援，我们撑不了多久了！

english: SECTOR OBJECTIVE: Protect ship under attack
translation: 星区目标：保护受到攻击的船只

english: We've marked the location of the wrecked ship on your map. Please hurry!
translation: 我们已经在地图上标出了失事船只的位置，请抓紧时间！

english: All crew have been rescued from the ship! Drop them off at the nearest starbase or colony.
translation: 船上的所有船员都已获救！将他们送到最近的星港或殖民地。

english: Investigate a distress call in system S*X.
translation: 调查 S*X 星系中的求救信号。

english: There are hostile forces in the area. (+50% pay)
translation: 该地区有敌对势力。（+50% 报酬）

english: There are reports of a meteor shower in the area. (+25% pay).
translation: 有报告称该地区将出现流星雨。（+25%报酬）。

english: *X crew out of *Y have made it to safety. Payment owed $*Z.
translation: *X / *Y 船员已安全抵达。待支付酬金：$*Z。

english: You will require four manoeuvring thrusters to successfully dock with the damaged ship.
translation: 你至少需要四个机动推进器，才能成功与受损的船只对接。

english: *X crew out of *Y have been rescued and are on board.
The ship is spinning out of control. It will be very challenging to dock. (+25% pay)
translation: 这艘船正在失控，与其对接难度非常高。（+25% 报酬）

english: The ship is moving - you will need some skill to dock safely. (+25% pay)
translation: 这艘船在移动，与其对接有一定难度。（+25% 报酬）

english: NB. YOU WILL NEED AT LEAST FOUR THRUSTERS TO MANOEUVRE INTO POSITION.
translation: 注意：你至少需要四个推进器才能操纵到位。

english: The ship engines will explode very soon. (+25% pay).
translation: 这艘船的引擎很快就会爆炸。(+25% 报酬）

english: The ship engine core will explode in just *X seconds!!
translation: 这艘船的引擎核心将在 *X 秒内爆炸

english: SECTOR OBJECTIVE: Rescue civilians from wrecked ship
translation: 星区目标：从失事船只中营救平民

english: Excellent. We are sending a shuttle to you now.
translation: 好极了，我们现在就派穿梭机过去。

english: Thank you very much for helping us with these unique creatures. If I'm honest, we have struggled to find a captain who was willing to undertake this mission.
translation: 非常感谢你帮助我们找到这些独特的生物。老实说，我们一直在努力寻找愿意承担这项任务的舰长。

english: We have left you with a litter of eight female Tiddlets, along with some comfortable crates for them to sleep in.
translation: 我们给你留了一窝八只雌性提德莱特，还有一些舒适的箱子供它们睡觉。

english: Please take very good care of them!
We have received all of your Tiddlets. Thank you so much!
translation: 我们已经接收了你这边所有的提德莱特。非常感谢！

english: Now, there is one crucial detail you must adhere to, in order to safely transport these Tiddlets.
translation: 现在，为了安全运输这些提德莱特，你必须遵守一个关键细节。

english: They can survive up to *X seconds in hyperspace safely, but anything beyond that risks them dying of shock.
translation: 它们在超空间中最多可以安全存活 *X 秒，但超过这个时间，它们就有可能因休克而死亡。

english: Please be very careful when choosing your hyperspace route.
translation: 在选择超空间路线时，请务必小心谨慎。

english: There are now *X dead tiddlets on board
translation: 现在船上有 *X 只死掉的提德莱特。

english: We have delivered *X out of 8 Tiddlets.
translation: 我们已经交付了 *X / 8 只提德莱特。

english: We need a transport vessel to ferry a litter of lovable, rare live animals to a sanctuary, many jumps away.
translation: 我们需要一艘运输船，将一窝可爱的珍稀活体动物运往远在千里之外的避难所。

english: The animals aren't dangerous, but they do have some special requirements that must be closely followed or they will not survive the journey.
translation: 这些动物并不危险，但它们有一些特殊的要求必须严格遵守，否则就无法在旅途中存活下来。

english: We will pay $*X if the entire litter is delivered safely.
translation: 如果整窝都能安全送达，我们将支付酬金 $*X 。

english: Since you delivered an entirely new litter to us, we thought it only fair to reward you with a gift.
