translation: 既然你为我们带来了新的一窝，送您一份礼物是非常公平交易。

english: We have sent you a couple of prototype Long Range Hyperspace Sensors. They are much more sensitive than the standard model. We hope you find them useful.
translation: 我们给你送去了几个超空间长距离传感器的原型机，它们比标准型号更加灵敏，希望对你有用。

english: We have now received an additional *X Tiddlets!
translation: 我们又收到了 *X 只提德莱特！

english: What the hell happened? We trusted you with those Tiddlets and you let us down!
translation: 到底发生了什么事？我们曾经那么信任你，你辜负了我们！

english: Greetings! We are looking for a pilot who can help us with an important animal welfare matter.
translation: 你好，我们正在寻找一名能够帮助我们处理一项重要动物福利事务的飞行员。

english: If you'd like to help (and earn a lot of credits) please find our job in the CONTRACTS list.
translation: 如果您想提供帮助（并获得大量酬金）请在“合约”列表中找到我们的工作。

english: But we trusted you to look after their safety. You've let us down.
translation: 但我们曾经信任你，让你照顾他们的安全。你辜负了我们。

english: We have safely received *X out of 8 Tiddlets - Payment due $*Y
translation: 我们已安全收到 *X / 8 只提德莱特，待支付酬金 $*Y

english: Oh my goodness! We were certain all 8 were female, but clearly we made a mistake.
translation: 我的天啊！我们很确定这 8 只都是母的，看来是搞错了。

english: We would suggest you separate them, but tiddlets reproduce telepathically, and only ever during hyperspace travel.
translation: 我们建议你把它们分开，但提德莱特是通过心灵感应繁殖的，而且只能在超空间跃迁过程中进行繁殖。

english: Oh my goodness!! There are so many of them!
If you have Tiddlets available then bring them to us and we will reward you handsomely.
translation: 如果您有提德莱特，请把它们带给我们，我们会给您丰厚的酬金。

english: We won't ask any questions as to where they came from. But we will need every Tiddlet you have - so we can be sure there is at least one male among the litter.
translation: 我们不会问它们从哪里来，不过需要所有的提德莱特， 这样才能确保这窝提德莱特中至少有一只雄性。

english: Well, thank you very much. With this many Tiddlets we can begin farming these delicious creatures immediately.
translation: 非常感谢，有了这么多提德莱，我们就可以马上开始养殖这些美味的生物了。

english: We are willing to pay a very generous price to any individual who can supply us with one or more Tiddlets.
translation: 如果有人能向我们提供一只或更多的提德莱特，我们愿意支付非常慷慨的价格。

english: We are offering you $*Y for all *X of your Tiddlets.
translation: 我们将给你支付 $*Y 以购买 *X 只提德莱特。

english: We've heard a rumour you might have some rare, valuable life-forms on board.
translation: 我们听说你的舰船上可能有一些稀有、珍贵的生命体。

english: Stop by your nearest Contract Board and we might be able to make a deal.
translation: 请到离您最近的合约板，我们也许能做成一笔交易。

english: We will pay $*X for every Tiddlet you have.
translation: 我们将为您的每一只提德莱特支付 $*X 。

english: We have received *X Tiddlets. Total payment due $*Y.
translation: 我们已收到 *X 只提德莱特，应付酬金总额 $*Y 。
已交易 *X 只提德莱特
AI 控制 - 自动选择
为自动保存保留的存档名称。

english: Hostile ships will only target you once you have targeted them first.
translation: 只有当你首先瞄准敌舰时，敌舰才会开始瞄准你。
存档名称包含无效字符。

english: Enables multi-system simulation, allowing you to split up your fleet among multiple systems/sectors simultaneously.
translation: 启用多星系模拟，允许你的舰队同时分布在多个星系/星区中。

english: We hope you enjoyed playing the demo of The Last Starship. Your journey has just begun!  Unlock the full game to explore more Story Episodes, Survival Mode, Arena Mode, a full Ship Editor and more!
translation: 希望您喜欢《最后的星舰》试玩版。您的旅程才刚刚开始，解锁完整版游戏以探索更多故事情节、生存模式、竞技场模式，还有完整的舰船编辑器！

english: The game will be saved to Steam Cloud when enabled. A warning will show if the save fails.
translation: 启用后游戏存档将上传至 Steam 云。如果保存失败将会显示警告。
更新现有创意工坊物品

english: You will need to turn your ships into a long term self sufficient fleet.
translation: 您需要将您的战舰变成一支能够长期自给自足的舰队。

english: Bring as many people with you as you can, and don't look back.
translation: 带尽可能多的人一起离去，不要回头。

english: You currently have *X residents within your fleet.
translation: 你的舰队中目前共有 *X 居民。

english: It's possible we won't ever be able to stop the void collapse anomaly.
translation: 我们有可能永远无法阻止虚空坍塌异常现象。

english: It may just keep expanding forever. There may be nowhere safe for us to stop.
translation: 它可能会一直无限扩张下去，我们可能无处停留。

english: In which case we need to get used to living on self sufficient ships, indefinitely.
translation: 在这种情况下，我们需要习惯无限期地在自给自足的舰船上生活。

english: Next bonus when population reaches *X residents - $*Y.
translation: 当人口达到 *X 时的下一个奖励 - $*Y 。

english: Population has reached *X residents. Funding bonus $*Y.
translation: 人口已达到 *X 居民，资金奖励 $*Y 。

english: Your highest population was *X residents within your fleet.
translation: 你的舰队中人口最多的是 *X 居民。

english: Pumps oxygen into the surrounding cabin until a breathable atmosphere is achieved. Must be supplied with Oxygen through a pipe.
translation: 将氧气泵入周围的舱室直至达到可呼吸的环境。必须通过管道供应氧气。
将二氧化碳转化为可呼吸的氧气。

english: Stores any excess power available in the powergrid, up to 1000MJ. The battery will supply power whenever there is a shortage.
translation: 可储存电力系统中多余的电能最多可达 1000 兆焦耳。一旦电力短缺电池就会供电。

english: Broken hop drive, capable of hopping within systems
translation: 损坏的短距跃迁引擎，原本用于进行星系内跳跃

english: A box of ammo for a Gatling Gun (PDC).
translation: 一盒加特林机枪的弹药。

english: A medium range weapon system that launches a barrage of explosive shells at the target. Cannon shells are excellent at dealing area-of-effect damage to an enemy ship, and will shred hull armour.
translation: 一种中程武器系统，可向目标发射一连串爆炸性炮弹。炮弹能对敌舰造成极佳的范围伤害，并且会破坏敌舰的船体装甲。

english: A complex piece of scientific equipment.  Can combine multiple different chemical inputs (liquids, gases and solids) into different outputs. The user can cycle the active 'recipe' by clicking on it.
translation: 一种复杂的科学设备，可将多种不同的液体、气体组合转换成不同的输出。玩家可以通过点击来循环切换激活的“配方”。

english: Laser infuser, infuses objects with energy. No tiddlets were harmed in the making of this equipment.
translation: 激光注能器为物体注入能量。制造此设备无需伤害任何提德莱特。

english: A defensive system that uses a deflector beam to divert incoming rocket shells
translation: 利用偏导光束干扰来袭火箭弹的防御系统。

english: Provides an access point to the ship so that shuttle craft can dock and undock.
translation: 为舰船提供一个出入口，以便穿梭机进行对接。

english: A heavy pressure door that can be used to seal off areas in the event of a hull breach or fire.
translation: 一扇抗压门，可在船体破裂或起火时用于封锁区域。

english: This equipment is required to launch Logistics Drones from your ship. Drones can gather resources and salvage from space, then bring it back to the ship through the Drone Bay. One Drone Bay can launch multiple Drones.
translation: 用于从舰船上发射货运无人机的设备。无人机能够从太空中收集资源和打捞残骸，然后通过无人机舱将其带回船内。一个无人机舱可以发射多架无人机。

english: A large piece of equipment, capable of transmitting up to 200MW to the Stargate.
translation: 一个大型设备，能够向星门传输高达 200 兆瓦的电力。

english: The ship's main source of forward thrust.  Must be supplied with Fuel (via a pipe) and Power (via a cable).
translation: 舰船前进推力的主要来源，必须使用管道为其提供燃料，使用电缆为其提供能源。

english: Takes a canister of Fuel, and pumps it into an underfloor pipe. Use pipes to connect this to your Reactor and your Engines.
translation: 接收燃料罐并将其泵入地板下的管道，使用管道将其连接到反应堆和引擎。

english: Uses nuclear fusion of Deuterium to generate large amounts of energy. However the fusion reactor must be 'powered up' with a huge amount of energy before it will generate any power itself.\n\nGenerates a maximum power output of 500MW.
translation: 利用氘核聚变产生大量能量。但是聚变反应堆必须先消耗大量能量进行“启动”，然后才能自行发电。\n\n最大输出功率为 500 兆瓦。

english: A large exterior vent that sucks in gases from space. Many gases found in nebulas can be used to produce useful resources like Fuel, FTL charges, and explosives.
translation: 一种大型外部风管，可从太空中吸入气体。星云中的许多气体都可以用来生产有用的资源如常规燃料、超光速燃料和炸药。

english: A close range rapid-fire weapon system, primarily designed for defense against incoming fighters and ordnance.  The gatling gun excels at destroying fast-moving targets at close range, but lacks the punch to penetrate armoured targets.
translation: 一种近距离速射武器系统，主要用于防御来袭的战斗机和子弹。加特林机枪擅长在近距离摧毁快速移动的目标，但缺乏穿透装甲目标的威力。

english: An enclosed greenhouse device that can be used to grow crops, in order to feed your crew.  Requires compost and water, and Seeds to get things started.
translation: 一种封闭式温室装置，可以用来种植作物，为你的船员提供食物。需要堆肥、水和种子来启动。

english: The Hyperspace Scoop sits at the front of a starship and faces the direction of travel. During hyperspace a strong magnetic field is projected forward, drawing in large volumes of interstellar matter. The isotopes gathered this way can be refined into FTL Fuel.
translation: 超空间采集器必须安装在舰船前部，面向航行方向。在超空间中，采集器会向前投射强大的磁场，吸引大量星际物质。通过这种方式收集的同位素可以提炼成超光速燃料。

english: A Long Range and extremely sensitive prototype version of the standard hyperspace sensor.
translation: 超空间传感器，距离更远、灵敏度更高的原型版本。

english: Grinds giant lumps of ice into small pieces, then warms the ice until it melts into liquid. The resulting water must be filtered before it is safe to drink.
translation: 将巨大的冰块研磨成碎块然后加热直至融化成液体，由此产生的水必须经过过滤才能安全饮用。

english: These are installed in the exterior wall of your ship, reducing the damaging effects of lightning and providing more control over where the lightning strikes. They cannot be repaired, but they will queue the installation of their replacement, when destroyed by lightning.
translation: 安装在舰船外壁，可引导雷击位置，减少闪电造成的伤害。它无法被修复，在被闪电击毁后会自动生成替换安装任务。

english: This is a general purpose version of the Fuel Loader and Oxygen Loader, and can take any liquid or gas canister.  Known to heavily confuse new captains.  Use pipes to connect the Loader to other equipment.
translation: 这是燃料装载器和氧气装载器的通用版本，可以接收任何液体或气体罐。众所周知这会让新任舰长感到非常困惑。使用管道将装载器与其他设备连接起来。

english: An incredibly useful semi-intelligent robot, capable of gathering salvage from deep space. Can also perform minor repairs to a damaged hull. Must be launched from a Drone Bay.
translation: 一种非常有用的半智能无人机，能够从深空打捞物品，还能对损坏的船体进行轻度维修。必须从无人机舱发射。

english: Can drill into mineral patches (found in asteroid belts) to extract valuable minerals.
translation: 可钻入于小行星上的矿脉，以提取有价值的矿物。

english: A workbench where a skilled crew member can fabricate different forms of ammunition for ship weapon systems. Uses metal and explosives to produce Bullets, Railgun Slugs, Cannon Shells etc.
translation: 一种工作台，技术熟练的船员可以在这里为舰船武器系统制造不同形式的弹药。使用金属和炸药制造子弹、轨道炮弹头和炮弹等。

english: Takes a pressurised canister of oxygen and pumps it into an underfloor pipe.  Use pipes to connect this to your Airduct, to supply oxygen to the cabin.
translation: 接收氧气罐并将其泵入地板下的管道，使用管道将其连接到通风机，为船舱提供氧气。

english: Uses electrical power to extract Oxygen from Water.
translation: 消耗电力从水中提取氧气。

english: Radiation blocker, significantly reduces all radiation passing through it. Place between your crew and equipment that emit radiation.
translation: 辐射阻断器可大大减少通过它的所有辐射，放置在工作人员和放射性设备之间。

english: Emits radiation. For testing new radiation mechanic (has no gameplay use).
translation: 发射辐射，用于测试新的辐射机制，无游戏内用途。

english: An extremely accurate and long range weapon system that fires a solid slug of metal. The Railgun is a precise weapon that can penetrate through hull armour and destroy equipment inside the target ship. However, the weapon draws a huge amount of energy to recharge after each shot.
translation: 一种极其精准的远程武器系统，可发射固体金属弹头。轨道炮是一种精确武器，可以穿透船体装甲摧毁目标舰船内的设备。不过这种武器每次发射后都需要消耗大量能量来充电。

english: A box of ammo for a Railgun.
Burns high-energy Fuel to produce power. Must be supplied with Fuel (via a pipe). Then use cables to connect to other powered equipment.\n\nGenerates a maximum power output of 100MW.
translation: 燃烧高能燃料产生动力。必须通过管道供应燃料，然后使用电缆将其连接到其他用电设备。\n\n最大输出功率为 100 兆瓦。

english: An automatic industrial machine for refining raw chemicals and gases.
translation: 用于提炼化学原料和气体的自动工业机器。

english: The local shipyard can repair the heavy structural damage on your ship, for a price.
translation: 当地船坞可修复您舰船的严重结构性损伤，需付费。

english: This processor chip contains information that can be used to boost our current research or improve the efficiency of our equipment.
translation: 该处理器芯片包含的信息可用于促进我们当前的研究或提高我们设备的效率。

english: A workstation for a scientist to conduct valuable research.
translation: 供科学家进行有价值研究的工作站。

english: Extracts Carbon Dioxide from the atmosphere. Its output must be piped into a storage tank or it will become blocked.
translation: 从空气中过滤出二氧化碳，其输出必须通过管道输送至储罐，否则将发生堵塞。

english: A small bag of mixed vegetable seeds, that you might be able to grow in a Hydroponic Garden.
translation: 一小袋混合蔬菜种子，你可以在水培花园中种植。

english: Takes sewage from the habitation deck, separates the solid and liquid waste, and partially recycles them. The device outputs dirty water and compost.
translation: 接收来自居住甲板的污水，分离固体和液体废物，并对其进行部分回收利用。该装置输出脏水和堆肥。

english: This pipe extracts sewage from the habitation deck above. You can then pipe the sewage into a storage tank and (eventually) reprocess it back into water.  The Pipe MUST BE DIRECTLY UNDER THE HABITATION DECK to function.
translation: 此管道从上方的居住甲板抽取污水。你可以用管道将污水输送到储罐中，并最终将其重新处理成水。此管道必须直接安装于居住甲板下方才能生效。

english: Small storage crate, stores a single type of resource but at 4x the usual amount per square
translation: 小型储物箱，仅存储单一类型的资源，但每单位空间存储量是地板的 4 倍

english: A storage tank that can store liquids and gases.
translation: 可储存液体和气体的储罐。

english: This industrial processing machine can melt ores into usable metal ingots. Once installed, click on it to change the ore type.
translation: 此工业加工机器可将矿石冶炼成可用的金属锭。安装后点击它以更改矿石类型。

english: These must be installed outside your ship, with scaffolding for support. Each panel generates 10MW.
translation: 必须安装在舰船外部，需要脚手架作为支撑。每块电池板的发电量为 10 兆瓦。

english: A storage place for spacesuits that need their oxygen replenishing.
translation: 存放宇航服并为其补充氧气的地方。

english: Crew and passengers can only access the upper habitation deck with a ladder.
translation: 船员和乘客只能通过梯子进入上层居住甲板。

english: Storage crate, stores a single type of resource but at 4x the usual amount per square
translation: 储物箱仅存储单一类型的资源，但每单位空间存储量是地板的 4 倍

english: A powerful computer for number crunching and simulating important research.
translation: 用于数据运算和模拟重要研究的强大计算机。

english: A massive tank that can store a great deal of liquid or gas.
translation: 一个巨大的罐子，可以储存大量的液体或气体。

english: A sensor capable of detecting telepathic waves.
translation: 能够探测心灵感应波的传感器。

english: Maneuvering thruster. Must be attached to the wall of the ship. Provides thrust to permit lateral and rotational movement.
translation: 姿态控制推进器。必须安装在船壁上，提供推力使舰船能够平移和旋转。

english: A storage tank that can store liquids and gases.
translation: 可储存液体和气体的储罐。

english: Takes dirty water from sewage recycling or from naturally occurring ice - and purifies it into safe drinkable water.
translation: 接收来自污水回收或天然冰块的脏水，并将其净化为安全的饮用水。

english: A terminal where a Weapons Officer can control multiple weapons at the same time.
translation: 供武官同时控制多种武器的终端。

english: It is the 23rd century.  Humanity has colonised the stars.
translation: 现在是 23 世纪，人类已在群星间建立殖民地。

english: Millions of people now live off world, sometimes hundreds of light years from Earth.
translation: 如今数百万人类生活在地球之外，有些甚至距离地球数百光年。

english: Word has reached Earth from one such colony. A dark anomaly has been seen, and cannot be explained.
translation: 地球收到来自其中一个殖民地的消息，那里发现了一种无法解释的黑暗异常现象。

english: Where once there was a star, now there is nothing but a black void, slowly expanding.
translation: 曾经的恒星所在地，如今只剩下一片黑色的虚空，且正在缓慢扩张。

english: Those who live nearby call it THE COLLAPSE, and believe it will eventually consume the entire galaxy.
translation: 附近的居民称其为“大崩塌”，并相信它最终将吞噬整个银河系。

english: There are few who believe them.
Nevertheless, Earth has dispatched you and your crew in the science vessel PRAXIS to investigate.
translation: 尽管如此，地球方面还是派遣了你和你的船员，驾驶“实践号”科考船前往调查。

english: It is the 23rd century.  Humanity has colonised the stars.
translation: 现在是 23 世纪。人类已在群星间建立殖民地。

english: Millions of people now live off world, sometimes hundreds of light years from Earth.
translation: 如今数百万人类生活在地球之外，有些甚至距离地球数百光年。

english: Word has reached Earth from a distant science station. A dark anomaly has been detected, and cannot be explained.
translation: 地球收到来自遥远科学站的消息，那里检测到一种无法解释的黑暗异常现象。

english: Where once there was a star, now there is nothing but a black void, endlessly expanding and consuming everything in its path.
translation: 曾经的恒星所在地，如今只剩下一片黑色的虚空，无休止地扩张着，吞噬沿途的一切。

english: Scientists believe it will eventually consume the entire galaxy.
translation: 科学家认为它最终将吞噬整个银河系。

english: There is only one glimmer of hope. A STARGATE project, unfinished and unproven, offers an escape route to a distant Galaxy.
translation: 现在仅存一线希望，一个未完成且未经测试的星门工程，提供了一条通往遥远星系的逃生之路。

english: But the scale of the catastrophe is almost too big to comprehend. Only a few will survive.
translation: 但这场灾难的规模几乎超乎想象，只有极少数人能幸存。

english: With a new ship and a new crew, you commit yourself to reaching the STARGATE with as many people as you can, before it's too late.
translation: 驾驶着新的舰船，带领着新的船员，你决心在为时已晚之前，尽可能多地将人们送往星门。

english: It is the 23rd century.  Humanity has colonised the stars.
translation: 现在是 23 世纪，人类已在群星间建立殖民地。

english: Millions of people now live off world, sometimes hundreds of light years from Earth.
translation: 如今数百万人类生活在地球之外，有些甚至距离地球数百光年。

english: The era of massive industrialisation of space has begun, feeding an insatiable desire for energy and metal.
translation: 太空大规模工业化的时代已经开启，以满足对能源和金属的无尽渴望。

english: Powerful businesses control vast swathes of space, backed by untold reserves of wealth.
translation: 强大的企业坐拥无法估量的财富，控制着广袤的星域。

english: The CEO of one such company - the INTERSTELLAR MINING CORPORATION - has challenged humanity to build a stargate so powerful it can reach our nearest Galaxy.
translation: 其中一家公司——星际矿业公司——的首席执行官，向全人类发起挑战：建造一个足以抵达临近星系的星门。

english: Trillions of dollars in funding have been set aside.
translation: 数万亿美元的资金已准备就绪。

english: The time is perfect for a small entrepreneurial and industrious team of miners to start a new career - and make their fortune in the stars.
translation: 对于一支富有创业精神且勤劳肯干的小型矿工团队来说，现在正是开启新事业、在群星间发家致富的绝佳时机。

english: It is the 23rd century.  Humanity has colonised the stars.
translation: 现在是 23 世纪，人类已在群星间建立殖民地。

english: Millions now thrive on distant worlds, living hundreds of light years from Earth.
translation: 如今数百万人在距离地球数百光年的遥远世界中繁衍生息。

english: As space becomes the new frontier, an era of unprecedented exploration and expansion unfolds.
translation: 随着太空成为新的边疆，一个前所未有的探索与扩张时代正徐徐展开。

english: Powerful corporations dominate entire regions, but beyond their reach lies uncharted territory, filled with untold mysteries and boundless opportunities.
translation: 强大的企业主宰着整片星域，但在它们的势力范围之外仍有未知的疆域，充满了难以言喻的奥秘和无限的机遇。

english: The CEO of the INTERSTELLAR MINING CORPORATION has issued a daring challenge: build a stargate powerful enough to reach our nearest galaxy.
translation: 星际矿业公司的首席执行官发起了一项大胆的挑战：建造一个足以抵达临近星系的星门。

english: With trillions in funding up for grabs, the stage is set for fearless adventurers to forge their own path in the cosmos.
translation: 数万亿资金虚位以待，为无畏的冒险家在宇宙中开辟自己的道路搭建了舞台。

english: Will you rise to the challenge, and chart your own course among the stars?
translation: 你是否愿意迎接挑战，在群星间开辟属于自己的航线？
上传到 Steam 创意工坊的舰船
已订阅 Steam 创意工坊
已上传至 Steam 创意工坊

english: Install some Batteries to store reserve power from your Reactor.
translation: 安装一些电池来储存反应堆的多余电力。

english: Your ship cannot generate enough power. Consider installing more Reactors.
translation: 你的舰船无法产生足够的电力，请考虑安装更多反应堆。

english: Load into a Science Station for analysis
The ship's computer is coming online now.
We should be able to get some answers. Have your crew start a data transfer so we can get the flight logs.
translation: 我们应该能找到答案，让你的船员启动数据传输，我们就能拿到飞行日志了。

english: The nebula is so thick, it's blocking visibility. But we are detecting something on the sensors. They're here somewhere.
translation: 星云很厚，挡住了视线，但我们的传感器探测到了一些东西，就在附近的某个地方

english: You'll have to do a sweep of the area. Take it slow, and use the sensor view in TACTICAL to try to find the ship.
translation: 你需要仔细检查该区域，慢慢来，使用战术界面中的传感器视图来寻找舰船。

english: More wreckage. More bodies.  The ship must be somewhere nearby.
translation: 这么多残骸，这么多尸体，这艘船一定就在附近。

english: The ship didn't even manage to activate its Flight Recorder.  We must investigate.
translation: 这艘船甚至没有启动飞行记录仪，我们必须进行调查

english: The Docking Port is still operational.  Dock your ship with the Celestial Hammer, and take a team on-board to look for survivors.
translation: 对接口仍然完整可用，将你的舰船对接到天锤号上，带一队人上去寻找幸存者。

english: Could it have been some sort of catastrophic accident?
translation: 会不会是某种灾难性事故？

english: I have to know what happened, Captain.
translation: 舰长，我必须知道发生了什么。

english: Your crew will repair the reactors and power up the ship. Once they're done, bring the ship back to spacedock. I need to do a proper forensic investigation.
translation: 你的船员将修复反应堆，为舰船提供动力。完成后把舰船带回空间站，我需要做一个完整的事故调查。

english: Transfer the ship to a Shipyard for analysis
translation: 将舰船转移到船坞进行分析

english: Captain, I need your help once again. One of my ships has gone missing out on a routine patrol. I fear the worst. I want you to find the ship, and bring her home.
translation: 舰长，我再次需要你的帮助。我方一艘战舰在一次例行巡逻中失踪了，我担心情况不妙，希望你能找到那艘船，把她带回家。

english: Thank you Captain. It's good to work with you once again, although I wish it was under better circumstances.
translation: 谢谢你，舰长。能够再次与你共事我很高兴，只是这次的情况更加不容乐观。

english: The ship in question is the Celestial Hammer. She was a major player in the battle against that cloaked pirate vessel. I lost contact with her a couple of days ago.
translation: 这艘船就是天锤号，她在与那艘隐身海盗船的战斗中发挥了重要作用。几天前我和她失去了联系。

english: I suspect foul play here, Captain. There's no way a ship like the Celestial Hammer would just vanish. Something must have happened, and I'm assuming the worst.
translation: 舰长，我怀疑这里面有猫腻，天锤号这样的战舰不可能就这么消失了。期间一定发生了什么事，我正在推测最坏的情况

english: The ship is heavily armed. If there is foul play at hand, well, I strongly advise you prepare for a fight.
translation: 这艘船全副武装，如果情况有任何异常，我强烈建议你做好战斗准备。

english: Help Cmdr Harken recover their ship
translation: 帮助哈肯中校找回他们的舰船

english: This save is likely to be overwritten by the game as you continue playing, so you should create a manual save if you haven't already done so using the SAVE GAME option.\n\nThis warning can be disabled in the settings menu.
translation: 继续游戏时该存档可能会被游戏覆盖，因此如果你还没有手动存档，建议立即选择“保存游戏”进行保存。\n\n该警告可在设置菜单中禁用。

english: The game failed to save to the cloud, the game has been saved locally instead.\n\nPlease check that you have enough storage in the Steam Cloud and try again.
translation: \n\n请检查 Steam 云存储的空间是否足够，然后重试。

english: The demo of The Last Starship can only load save games saved with the Demo.
translation: 《最后的星舰》演示版只能加载用演示版保存的游戏。

english: Due to incompatible changes in this version, your progress in active episodes will be reset.
translation: 由于此版本中存在不兼容的更改，你在剧情任务中的进度将被重置。

english: Due to new phases or storylines surrounding the stargate, your stargate progress has been reset.
translation: 由于围绕星门的任务增加了新阶段或故事情节，你的星门工程进度已重置。

english: You have loaded a game with a future save format, you may experience that some parts of the game do not work correctly
translation: 你加载了一个包含后续内容格式的存档，游戏的某些部分可能无法正常运行
警告：正在加载后续内容格式的存档

english: A huge community fuselage built by Zion - perfect for any career the Captain desires. The ship benefits from a huge cabin capacity, but is very slow and heavy.
translation: 由 Zion 建造的巨大社区舰船——非常适合舰长所期望的任何需求。该船拥有巨大的舱室容量，但速度非常慢且笨重。

english: A truly massive ship designed with heavy industry, science and logistics in mind.  Big, slow, and heavy - requiring a massive power grid and engine array.
translation: 一艘真正的巨型舰船，设计时考虑到了重工业、科研和货运需求。庞大、缓慢且笨重——需要庞大的电力系统和引擎阵列。

english: The Stargate Project demands your help! Industry and Automation take centre stage as you manufacture parts for a megaproject stargate to the Andromeda Galaxy.
translation: 星门工程需要您的帮助！工业和自动化占据核心地位，您将为通往仙女座星系的宏大星门工程制造部件。

english: Another large vessel well suited to combat and dangerous operations.  The forward hull is encased in heavy armour, making the ship much tougher, but also slower and less maneuverable.
translation: 另一艘非常适合作战和危险行动的大型舰船。前部船体包裹着重型装甲，使其更加坚固，但速度较慢、机动性较差。

english: A modular and easily expanded ship design, ideal for interstellar logistics and mining operations. With cabin space for over 50 crew or passengers.
translation: 模块化且易于扩展的舰船设计，是星际货运和采矿作业的理想选择。拥有可容纳 50 多名船员或乘客的舱室空间。

english: A tiny and fast science vessel with all necessary equipment for interstellar adventure, and provisioned with enough supplies for a small crew.
translation: 一艘小巧快速的科考船，配备了星际探险所需的所有设备，并为小规模船员提供了充足补给。

english: A community ship built by Orion Industries - a perfect balance of form and function. Decent cabin space and room for equipment, but small and light enough to be fast and nimble.
translation: 由 Orion Industries 建造的社区舰船——完美平衡了外形与功能。拥有不错的舱室空间和设备空间，同时足够小巧足够轻便，快速灵活。

english: The absolute minimum ship fuselage, but you are docked at a fully operational Shipyard with a generous starting budget to build whatever ship you want from scratch.
translation: 绝对最小的船体但您停靠在一个全面运作的船坞拥有丰厚的起始预算可以从零开始建造任何您想要的舰船。

english: A more complex setup. A large and capable ship with plenty of room for upgrades, but with a heavier and slower hull.
translation: 更复杂的配置。一艘大型且功能强大的舰船拥有充足的升级空间，但船体较重速度较慢。

english: We've designed a custom sensor package that will give us the information we need.
translation: 我们设计了一套定制传感器，可以收集我们需要的信息。

english: A shuttle is on its way now with two of these sensors.
translation: 现在一架载有两个这种传感器的穿梭机已经在路上了。

english: You have captured *X Data from the anomaly.
translation: 您已经从异常点获取了 *X 数据。

english: We need more data so we can understand what this anomaly is.
translation: 我们需要更多的数据，以便了解这种异常现象是什么。

english: And we can't possibly stop the anomaly until we understand it.
translation: 在了解异常点之前我们不可能阻止它。

english: If you can gather enough science data for us, we think there's a good chance we can design a way to counteract the anomaly.
translation: 如果你能为我们收集到足够的科研数据，我们认为很有可能设计出一种方法来对抗异常点。

english: We can send you research funding as you collect data. Capture 10 data from the Anomaly and we'll send the first funding grant.
translation: 我们可以在你收集数据的同时向你发送研究资金。从异常点采集 10 个数据，我们就会发送第一笔资助。

english: Install the sensors on your ship (*X/2)
Ensure the sensors are powered and operational
translation: 确保传感器通电并正常工作

english: We've received your preliminary sensor data. Fascinating! It looks like the anomaly is expanding, and the rate of expansion is increasing.
translation: 我们收到了传感器的初步数据。很有意思！看起来异常点正在扩大，而且扩大的速度越来越快。

english: We've just paid you a science grant of $10,000. Capture 100 data to unlock more funding. The closer you fly to the anomaly, the faster the sensors collect data.
translation: 我们刚刚向你支付了 $10,000 作为科研补助。采集 100 个数据就能获得更多资助。你飞得离异常点越近，传感器采集数据的速度就越快。

english: We've now received 100 science packets from your sensors, thank you. This is invaluable data for us.
translation: 我们已经从传感器上收到了 100 个科研数据包，谢谢你。这对我们来说是非常宝贵的数据。

english: We've just sent you another $100,000.  The next bonus will be $1 Million for 1000 sensor data.  You can buy more hyperspace sensors at starbases and colonies.
translation: 我们刚刚又给你发了 $100,000。下一笔酬金是 $1,000,000 ，需要 1000 个传感器数据。你可以在星港和殖民地购买更多的超空间传感器。

english: Your sensors have now captured 1000 data from the anomaly. We have our best minds working on a solution and your data has been invaluable.
translation: 传感器已经从异常点采集了 1000 个数据。我们已经动用了最优秀的人才来研究解决方案，你的数据非常宝贵。

english: We're sending a $1M science grant to you now.  Keep doing what you're doing! More funding will be unlocked at 10,000 science data.
translation: 我们现在就把 $1,000,000 科研基金发给你。继续你的工作，更多资金将在 10,000 个科研数据时解锁。
下一档奖励需要 100,000 份科研数据
下一档奖励需采集 *X 数据：$*Y。

english: Both sensors are on board your ship. You need to install them.
translation: 两个传感器都在你的舰船上了，需要先进行安装。
采集 *X 数据，资金奖励为 $*Y。

english: These sensors will collect data from the anomaly while you are in Hyperspace.
translation: 当你在超空间时，这些传感器将会采集异常点的数据。

english: The closer you can hyperjump to the anomaly, the faster they will collect data.
translation: 超空间跃迁路径离异常点越近，它们采集数据的速度就越快。

english: When searching in lists, ignore accented characters, e.g. é will match e
translation: 在列表中搜索时忽略重音字符例如 “é” 将匹配 “e”。

english:
We need to collect usage data to help us to better understand how people are playing and to help us to improve the game. 

We do not collect any personally identifiable information.

To find out more visit Legal Information (bottom of the screen)
translation:
我们需要收集使用数据，以帮助我们更好地了解玩家的游戏情况，并帮助我们改进游戏。

我们不会收集任何个人身份信息。

欲了解更多信息请访问法律信息（入口在界面底部）。

english: When enabled, the current game will create an auto-save when abandoned or when the game is quit.
translation: 启用后，放弃或退出游戏时将自动保存当前进度。

english: When switching between ships, skip the transition
translation: 在舰船之间切换时跳过过渡

english: Background rotation is removed, which should help if you experience motion sickness in-game.
translation: 取消背景旋转，这对在游戏中感觉晕头转向的玩家应该有所帮助。

english: Enable features to help translators, such as Alt to reveal English and Ctrl to reveal the phrase key. Enables the translation editing window ({TranslatorWindow}).
translation: 启用辅助翻译功能，例如按 Alt 显示英文原文，按 Ctrl 显示主键名，启用翻译编辑窗口 ({TranslatorWindow})。
AI 控制 - 极近轨道

english: You will be missing *X when ongoing deliveries/logistics complete
translation: 当正在进行的交付、货运完成时，你将减少 *X

english: Upgrade your hull with armour panels to absorb damage
translation: 用装甲板升级船体以吸收伤害

english: Create an entirely new ship from scratch
translation: 从零开始打造全新舰船

english: Deconstruct your ship square by square
Install a docking port. Every ship needs at least one functioning docking port.
translation: 安装对接口，每艘舰船至少需要一个能正常使用的对接口。

english: Queue the installation of equipment inside your ship.
translation: 在舰船内安排设备安装任务。

english: Lets you select a paint from the exterior of your ship (can also be used by pressing the {AltTool} key)
translation: 让你从舰船外部选择一种涂料，也可通过按{AltTool}键使用

english: Expand your habitation deck to support more crew and passengers
translation: 扩建居住甲板，为更多船员和乘客提供支持

english: Modify the shape of your spaceship hull
Open up the interior of your spaceship to create cabins
translation: 打开舰船内部，创建舱室

english: Toggle painting the floor tiles of your ship
translation: 切换为对舰船地砖进行涂装

english: Toggle painting the exterior panels of the habitation quarters of your ship
translation: 切换为对舰船居住区的外墙板进行涂装

english: Toggle painting the exterior panels of the hull of your ship
translation: 切换为对船体的外部面板进行涂装

english: Toggle painting the scaffolding on your ship
translation: 切换为对船上的脚手架进行涂装

english: Change the colour of decals applied to the walls of your ship
Toggle painting the base colour of the walls of your ship
translation: 切换为绘制舰船墙壁的基色

english: Add scaffolding to support equipment on the exterior of your ship
translation: 加装脚手架，为舰船外部的设备提供支持

english: Spawn equipment and resources inside your ship. (Creative Mode only)
translation: 在舰船内生成设备和资源。（仅限创造模式）

english: Apply or remove decals on the walls of your ship
translation: 在船壁上粘贴或去除贴花

english: Build walls inside your spaceship to partition the interior space
translation: 在舰船内建造墙壁，以分隔内部空间
仙女座项目第一、二阶段
仙女座项目第四、五阶段

english: To submit completed parts to the stargate project, sell them at any trade outpost in the sector
translation: 要向星门工程提交已完成的部件，请在该星区的任意贸易站出售这些部件。

english: Captain, the Stargate is ready for its first test. If supplied with enough power it should provide us access to a nearby uncharted sector.
translation: 舰长，星门已准备好进行首次运行测试。如果供电充足，它应该能让我们进入附近的未知星区。
通过研究以解锁此组件

english: Captain, the new sector needs to be surveyed before your sector map is populated with systems. We have a full scan underway for the sector, once it's completed more locations will be marked on your map.
translation: 舰长，需要先对新星区进行扫描，星区地图上才会出现星系。我们正在对该区域进行全面扫描，扫描完成后你的地图上会标注更多地点。

english: In the systems surveyed so far we've found new resources and severe weather systems, which may be just a glimpse into what awaits us in this sector.
translation: 目前为止勘探过的系统中，我们发现了新的资源和恶劣天气系统。这可能只是我们对星区的简单一瞥。

english: Who knows what you may find out here. Be careful, Captain.
translation: 谁知道你会在这里发现什么。请小心，舰长。

english: By submitting this item, you agree to the
translation: 提交此物品即表示您同意

english: By submitting this item, you agree to the
translation: 提交此物品即表示您同意

english: After a long and perilous journey, the survivors emerged into a new and uncharted galaxy.  Those left behind faced a desperate, nomadic life.  But those that made the jump face an even more uncertain future.  Humanity's survival remains on a knife edge...
translation: 经过漫长而危险的旅程幸存者来到了一个未知的新星系。  留下的人面临着绝望的游牧生活。  而那些成功跳跃的人则面临着更加不确定的未来。  人类的生存仍然岌岌可危......

english: We hope you enjoyed playing the demo of The Last Starship. Your journey has just begun!  Unlock the full game to explore more Story Episodes, Survival Mode, Arena Mode, a full Ship Editor and more!
translation: 希望您喜欢《最后的星舰》试玩版。您的旅程才刚刚开始  解锁完整版游戏探索更多故事情节、生存模式、竞技场模式、完整的舰船编辑器等
自动瞄准\n[左键] 启用自动瞄准\n[右键] 禁用自动瞄准

english: When enabled, the Docking Assistant will perform the final maneuovers required to dock your ship with another, once you are close enough.\n\nIt is recommended you disable Fleet Formation when attempting to dock.
translation: 启用后，一旦你的舰船与另一艘舰船靠得足够近，对接辅助就会执行对接所需的最后机动操作。\n\n建议在尝试进行对接时禁用舰队编队功能。

english: When enabled, your other fleet ships will take care of themselves during combat, moving to optimal range and engaging as best they can.
translation: 启用后，舰队中的其他战舰会在战斗中自行移动到最佳射程位置，并尽最大可能进行交战。

english: When enabled, all of the fleet ships within a system will fly together in close formation, following the lead of whichever ship you are directly controlling.
translation: 启用后，舰队中的舰船都将以紧密编队的方式飞行，跟随你直接控制的舰船前进。

english: When enabled, the camera's rotation and position track the currently selected layer.
translation: 启用后，摄像机会锁定当前舰船的方向和位置。

english: [LMB] Select weapon\n[SHIFT-LMB] Select multiple weapons\n[RMB] Clear current target
translation: [左键] 选择武器\n[SHIFT-左键] 选择多个武器\n[右键] 清除当前目标

english: Starting a new research project will lose all progress on the current one.
translation: 启动一个新的研究项目，将导致当前项目的所有进展付诸东流。

english: This research project requires a *X to be completed
translation: 本研究项目需要 *X 才能完成

english: Unlocks the ability to convert tracks into splitters, and vice versa. Splitters will evenly distribute items between their output directions.
translation: 解锁将轨道和分离器器互相转换的功能。分离器会在输出方向之间平均分配物品。

english: Unlocks schematics for hardware required to maintain a breathable atmosphere
translation: 解锁维持可呼吸大气所需设备的蓝图

english: Unlocks more schematics for hardware required to maintain a breathable atmosphere
translation: 解锁更多维持可呼吸大气所需设备的蓝图

english: Unlocks schematics for Tracks and Robot Arms
translation: 解锁轨道和机械臂的蓝图

english: Unlocks schematic for Short Robot Arm
Unlocks schematics to build a defensive system that can deflect incoming cannon shells
translation: 解锁使用偏导光束抵挡来袭炮弹的护盾蓝图

english: Unlocks schematics for construction of Logistics Drones
Upgrades drones so they collect minerals in batches, greatly speeding up the process
translation: 升级无人机，使其能批量采集矿物，大大加快采集速度

english: Increases the top speed of Drones by 50%
translation: 将无人机的最高速度提高 50%

english: Increases the top speed of Drones by 100%
translation: 将无人机的最高速度提高 100%

english: Spend research credits to continually increase the speed of our drones.
translation: 花费研究点数不断提高无人机的速度。

english: Unlocks schematic for Energy Transmitter and Receiver
translation: 解锁能量发射器和接收器蓝图

english: Unlocks efficiency improvements for all areas of life support and crew survival
translation: 提高所有维生系统、设备的效率

english: Improves crop yield to produce more food per cycle
translation: 提高作物产量，每个周期生产更多食物

english: Further improves crop yield, and unlocks schematics to manufacture Hydroponics Modules
translation: 进一步提高作物产量，并解锁制造水培模块的蓝图

english: Spend research credits to continually increase our crop yield.
translation: 花费研究点数不断提高作物产量。

english: Unlocks schematics for small logistics storage
Unlocks schematics for Medium sized storage
Unlocks schematics for Large logistics storage
Spend research credits to continually increase our smelting efficiency.
translation: 花费研究点数不断提高我们的冶炼效率。

english: Mining Lasers extract twice as many minerals per shot
translation: 采矿激光每次发射可提取两倍的矿物

english: Mining Lasers extract three times as many minerals per shot
translation: 采矿激光每次发射提取三倍的矿物

english: Infuse energy storage with Neubidium, providing it with enhanced efficiency and improved conductive properties.
translation: 为能量电池注入纽比迪姆，使其具有更高的效率和更好的导电性能。

english: The mineral collected from the local asteroid has never been seen before, we should investigate its uses.
translation: 从当地小行星上采集到的矿物前所未见，我们应该研究一下它的用途。

english: Simulations predict that the new charged crystals allow the Stargate to jump ships to different galaxies. The Stargate's computer systems need to be upgraded to handle this.
translation: 模拟预测新的充能水晶可以让星门把舰船跃迁到不同的星系。星门的计算机系统需要升级才能处理这个问题。

english: Spend research credits to continually improve the efficiency of our reactors.
translation: 花费研究点数不断提高反应堆的效率。

english: Improves all life-support recycling to 90% efficiency
translation: 将所有维生系统的循环效率提高到 90%

english: Brings all life-support recycling up to 100% efficiency
translation: 将所有维生系统的循环效率提高到 100%

english: Doubles the speed of all Robot Arms
translation: 将所有机械臂的速度提高一倍

english: Spend research credits to continually increase our robot arm speed.
translation: 花费研究点数不断提高机械臂的速度。

english: Unlocks improvements in all areas of advanced physics
translation: 解锁高级物理所有领域的改进功能

english: Unlock surveying the current sector for new systems nearby.
translation: 解锁星区扫描功能以寻找附近的新星系。

english: Unlocks schematic for Smart Robot Arm
Unlocks Phase 1 and 2 of the Andromeda Project.
translation: 解锁仙女座项目的第一和第二阶段。

english: Unlocks Phase 3 of the Andromeda Project.
translation: 解锁仙女座项目第三阶段。

english: Unlocks Phases 4 and 5 of the Andromeda Project.
translation: 解锁仙女座项目的第四和第五阶段。

english: Doubles the speed of all Tracks
translation: 将所有轨道的速度提高一倍

english: Triples the speed of all Tracks
translation: 将所有轨道的速度提高三倍

english: Unlocks schematics for hardware to capture and reprocess human waste
translation: 解锁收集和再处理人类排泄物的设备蓝图

english: Stable Zeleon is a safe, energy-dense gas that could be used for advanced energy storage.
translation: 稳定泽里昂是一种安全的高能量气体，可用于制造先进的储能设备。

english: The new gas we've observed seems to be quite unstable and is radiating high amounts of energy, our scientists need to find a safe way to collect and stabilise it.
translation: 我们观测到的这种新气体似乎很不稳定，正在不停地释放高能量辐射。我们的科学家需要找到一种安全的方法来收集和稳定这种气体。

english: Perform sector scans to find derelict ships that contain research credits.
translation: 执行星区扫描，寻找含有研究点数的舰船残骸。
加速研究（成本：1 研究点数）

english: Completing Andromeda Project phases ahead of the Deep Space Industrialists storyline will bypass those episodes.
translation: 在“深空实业家”剧情结束前完成“仙女座项目”的各个阶段，将会跳过这些情节。

english: After some careful analysis of the Stargate's blueprints, I have found the backdoor that the late Alexander James Elistar has left you.
translation: 经过对星门蓝图的仔细分析，我找到了已故的亚历山大·詹姆斯·埃利斯塔留给你的后门。

english: You will use this backdoor to upload a small virus that I have written to their command centre within the HQ. It will disable the station's offensive capabilities and place itself under your command.
translation: 你可以利用这个后门，把我编写的小病毒上传到总部的指挥中心。它将会关闭空间站的攻击能力，并夺取空间站的控制权。

english: Great work Captain! But my sensors are detecting a massive signature headi-
translation: 干得好，舰长！但我的传感器探测到一个巨大的信号正朝——

english: Commander Harken! I see that my first fleet has failed to deal with you. I suppose if I want something done properly I should do it myself.
translation: 哈肯指挥官！看来我的第一支舰队没能把你怎么样，果然是想把事情办好就得我亲自动手。

english: This is DOGMA Private Security force, we are en-route to the disturbance. ETA: imminent.
translation: 这里是DOGMA私人安保舰队，我们正在赶往骚乱现场。预计到达时间：即刻。

english: There are multiple hostile signatures inbound on our position! You must get in close range of the HQ and upload the virus. I'll do my best to keep their ships off you.
translation: 有多个敌对信号正在接近我们的位置。你必须接近总部并上传病毒，我会尽力不让他们的舰船靠近你。

english: I gave you a very clear warning, Captain. You could've had anything in the universe as our business partner.
translation: 舰长，我已经想你发出明确的警告。作为商业伙伴你原本可以拥有宇宙的一切。

english: It was a pleasure working with you.
translation: 可惜了，曾今我们的合作很愉快。

english: This is a message for Andromeda HQ. I am Commander Harken, Chief of Private Security for this sector, and I command you to stand down.
translation: 致 仙女座总部：我是哈肯指挥官，本星区的私人安保主管，我命令你们立即停止抵抗。

english: The Andromeda Navy in this sector has been destroyed, you are now blockaded, there is nothing left to fight for.
translation: 这个星区的仙女座海军已经被摧毁了，你们已经被包围了，没有继续反抗的必要了。

english: It's over, Captain. The Andromeda HQ will be placed under the jurisdiction of the Intergalactic Security Council while I make the necessary arrests. The access codes for the Stargate are back under our control.
translation: 结束了，舰长。在我进行必要抓捕的同时，仙女座总部将被置于星际安全委员会的管辖之下。星门的密钥又归我们管了。

english: The current leadership of the Andromeda Project will be dismantled and the new galaxy will be freed from their control.
translation: 仙女座项目目前的领导层将被解散，新星系将会摆脱他们的控制。

english: You've proven that you can be trusted with control of the Stargate, so I'll leave it in your hands.
translation: 你已经证明了你值得信任，可以掌控星门，因此我把它交给你了。

english: Goodbye Captain, and good luck with your new place in the galaxy.
translation: 再见了，舰长，祝你在银河系的新征程一切顺利。

english: I don't understand, how is that possible!?
Send all available power to railguns, set target to-
translation: 将所有可用能量输送到轨道炮，设定目标——

english: DANGER: POWER SYSTEMS DETERIORATING. POWER GRID OVERLOADED.\nNO POWER TO WEAPONS AND ENGINES.
translation: 危险：电力系统恶化。电力系统过载。\n武器和发动机没有电力供应。

english: Hello Captain, it's good to see you. These are all of the ships I control in this sector, the rest are on the other side of the Stargate, unable to reach us.
translation: 舰长你好，很高兴见到你。这些是我在本星区控制的所有舰船，其余的都在星门的另一端，无法联系到我们。

english: My officers have pin-pointed the position of their HQ. Upon arrival we expect to be met with heavy resistance from their private security forces.
translation: 我的军官已经确定了他们总部的位置，抵达后预计会遭到他们私人安保舰队的猛烈抵抗。

english: I should be able to grab their attention away from your fleet while you get close and take control of the station.
translation: 我应该能把他们的注意力从你这边上吸引过来，你负责接近空间站并控制它。

english: Good luck Captain, I'll see you on the battlefield.
translation: 祝你好运，舰长，我们战场上见。

english: Captain, I can route a signal to their powergrid and overload their generators, tell me when to trigger it!
translation: 舰长，我可以向他们的电力系统发送信号，让他们的发电机过载。什么时候触发等你命令！

english: I've lost both of my frigates Captain! I don't have enough firepower to win this!
translation: 舰长，我失去了两艘护卫舰！我方火力不足，可能赢不了了！

english: This is the Andromeda Navy's flagship! You should have access to its command centre from the HQ!
translation: 这是仙女座海军旗舰！你可以从总部控制它的指挥中心

english: Captain! The ship's weapons and engines are disabled, hit it with everything you've got!
translation: 舰长！旗舰的武器和引擎都失效了，全力攻击！

english: Greetings Captain, I was worried you had taken their side in all of this.
translation: 舰长你好，我还担心你会站在他们那边呢。

english: Captain! In direct violation of intergalactic law, the Andromeda Project has permanently closed access to the Stargate outside of their own ships. Colonists are stranded in the new sector, unable to return home.
translation: 舰长！仙女座项目直接违反了星际法，永久封锁了星门的入口，只允许他们自己的舰船通过，殖民者被困在新的星区，无法回家。

english: The Andromeda Project has moved their HQ and all key personell into an unknown location in the new sector, where we believe they are controlling the Stargate.
translation: 仙女座项目已将他们的总部和所有重要人员转移到星区的一个未知地点，我们相信他们在那里控制着星门。

english: You are the only one outside of the Andromeda Project with access codes, please call back as soon as you can. They must be stopped.
translation: 你是仙女座项目外唯一持有星门密钥的人，请尽快回电，必须阻止他们。

english: My plan is to use our fleets to take control of the HQ by force. Any and all damage to the HQ should be avoided, many innocent lives are on-board and the loss of life from destroying it would be far too great.\nI have devised a plan with an old friend of yours that should minimise casualties...
translation: 我的计划是，用我们的舰队武力控制总部。应该避免对总部造成任何破坏，因为上面有许多无辜的生命，摧毁总部会造成巨大的人员伤亡。\n我已经和你的一位老朋友制定了一个计划，应该可以最大限度地减少人员伤亡......

english: While you neutralise the HQ, my fleet will fight off the Andromeda Project navy. Once the battle is over, I will take control of the HQ and arrest everyone involved. Their conglomerate will be dismantled.
translation: 在你占领总部的同时，我的舰队将击退仙女座项目的海军。一旦战斗结束，我将控制总部，并逮捕所有相关人员。他们的集团将被摧毁。

english: The Stargate will fall back into our control. I've marked an allied shipyard on your map. I'll hide out there in the mean-time.
translation: 星门会回到我们掌控之下的。我在你的地图上标出了一个友军船坞，我会暂时在那边隐蔽。

english: Meet me to discuss the plan further. Goodbye for now.
translation: 与我会面以讨论计划详情。再见。

english: Take control of the Andromeda Project HQ
Assist the Institute with their experiments
Deliver the Tiddlets to the Institute for Interstellar Lifeforms
translation: 将提德莱特送到星际生命形式研究所

english: Purchase at least one Logistics Drone
translation: 购买至少一架货运无人机

english: Install at least one Drone Bay
translation: 安装至少一个无人机舱

english: No! Nooooo! Captain what happened? What did you do??
translation: 不队长发生什么事了你做了什么

english: It looks like they died of shock during the hyperspace jump.  Oh goodness, this is such horrible news.  Did any of them survive?
translation: 看来他们是在超空间跳跃过程中休克而死。  天啊这真是个可怕的消息  他们有人活下来了吗

english: We'll have to be so careful from now on, Captain. I suggest a maximum hyperspace jump range of *X light years while you have these creatures on board. We can't let any more of them perish this way.
translation: 从现在起我们必须小心谨慎舰长。我建议超空间跳跃的最大范围是*X 光年 当你带着这些生物的时候我们不能让更多的生物这样丧命。

english: This is the greatest day of my life!
translation: 这是我一生中最美好的一天

english: To be the first to discover and study an entirely new life form. One native to deep space! Think of all we can learn from these little creatures!
translation: 成为第一个发现并研究全新生命形式的人。一种原产于深空的生命形式想想我们能从这些小生物身上学到什么吧

english: I mean, you'll get some credit for finding them, of course. But I've waited my whole life for a moment like this.
translation: 我是说你能找到他们当然会有一些功劳但我一生都在等待这样的时刻

english: Incredible work, Captain. I can't believe how much we've seen, in such a short period of time.
translation: 了不起的工作舰长真不敢相信我们在这么短的时间内看到了这么多。

english: I've been analysing the onboard sensor data while you've been travelling around.  They don't exhibit any sort of physical mating behaviour, but there is a detectable energy exchange going on, and always between groups of three.
translation: 在你们四处旅行的时候我一直在分析机载传感器的数据。它们没有任何交配行为但有可探测到的能量交换而且总是三个一组。

english: They must be reproducing through some form of telepathy, and only in triplets, and only in hyperspace!  No wonder they're such a rare creature.
translation: 它们一定是通过某种心灵感应繁殖的 而且只有三胞胎还只能在超空间繁殖  难怪它们是如此稀有的生物

english: These findings will make an incredible research paper, Captain.  I'll be sure to credit you as the pilot who found the first living specimens.  I would offer to name the creatures after you, but they already have a name, so apologies for not being able to honour that tradition.
translation: 这些发现将成为一篇出色的研究论文 舰长  我一定会把你列为发现第一批活体标本的飞行员。  我本想用你的名字为这些生物命名但它们已经有名字了所以很抱歉不能尊重这一传统。

english: You'll be getting a call from Dr Swanson very soon.  He funds my lab and all of my research.  I've talked him into directing some of our research grant to you, as a fair reward.
translation: 你很快就会接到斯旺森博士的电话。  我的实验室和我所有的研究都是他资助的  我已经说服他把我们的一些研究基金给你 作为公平的回报
我的神啊你找到他们了

english: Oh jesus. There's two of them!
Captain, you've made an incredible discovery. We have seen these interstellar lifeforms before, on large asteroids deep in uncharted space. But never alive. And you've found a pair!
translation: 舰长 你有了惊人的发现我们以前在未知太空深处的大小行星上 见过这些星际生命体但从未见过活的而你发现了一对

english: What is a ship like yours doing all the way out here?
translation: 像你这样的船跑到这里来干什么

english: Maybe you can help?  I'm looking for creatures that usually live on small isolated asteroids, like the one in this system.
translation: 也许你能帮忙  我在寻找通常生活在孤立的小行星上的生物就像这个星系中的小行星。

english: If you find anything make sure to tell me.
translation: 如果有什么发现一定要告诉我。

english: Oh my goodness, I hope they're ok! What's happening??
translation: 天啊希望他们没事发生什么事了

english: Are you kidding me! They've... They've reproduced! We've just witnessed an interstellar life form, spontaneously reproducing!
translation: 开什么玩笑他们...它们繁殖了我们刚刚目睹了一种星际生命体 自发地进行繁殖

english: Oh this is just such incredible news. But what was the condition? Maybe these ones were already fertile and pregnant? Did you see any mating behaviours? I need to do more analysis.
translation: 哦这真是个令人难以置信的消息。但情况如何呢也许它们已经有生育能力并怀孕了你有没有看到任何交配行为我需要做更多的分析。

english: Keep looking Captain. Bring them all back to us when you're done.
translation: 继续找 船长完成后把它们都带回来给我们

english: You managed to bring them back? Amazing! I'll be here in a second.
translation: 你成功地把它们带回来了太神奇了我马上就来

english: I should introduce myself. My name is Artemis Toppingbury, and I'm a professor at the Institute of Interstellar Lifeforms.  We've been trying to find a live Tiddlet for years now.
translation: 我应该自我介绍一下我叫阿尔忒弥斯・托平伯里 我是星际生命体研究所的教授  多年来我们一直在寻找活的提德莱人

english: This is a massive breakthrough. Bring the Tiddlets on board, carefully, using a Logistics Drone. Once you have them, meet me at the Institute for Interstellar Lifeforms.  We're at Starbase S*X.
translation: 这是一个巨大的突破。用货运无人机小心地把提德莱特带上来。带上他们后到星际生命体研究所找我。我们在星际基地S*X。

english: Now we know where to look, we may be able to find more of them in deep space.
translation: 现在我们知道该去哪里找了也许我们能在深空找到更多它们。

english: The asteroid where you found them has a large iron and aluminium core, with some unusual crystalline structures on the outside.
translation: 你发现它们的那颗小行星有一个巨大的铁铝核心外部有一些不寻常的晶体结构。

english: There are similar asteroids within this sector that have been recorded and scanned.  Nobody would bother trying to mine such worthless rocks. They might not have looked too closely.
translation: 这个区域内还有类似的小行星它们都已被记录和扫描。  没有人会费心去开采这些毫无价值的石头。他们可能没有仔细观察。

english: I think it's worth searching there for more of these creatures.
translation: 我认为值得在那里寻找更多这种生物。

english: Captain. On behalf of the Institute for Interstellar Life, thank you. A monumental discovery.
translation: 舰长我代表星际生命研究所感谢你不朽的发现

english: Now let's talk real. Scientists like Artemis like to take all the credit, and bask in the glory of their peers. If your name does show up in their research paper, you can bet it will be on the very last page, in the smallest font available.
translation: 现在让我们说点实在的。像阿尔忒弥斯这样的科学家喜欢独揽功劳沉浸在同行的荣耀中。如果你的名字出现在他们的研究论文中你可以打赌那一定是在最后一页用最小的字体。

english: And despite funding his work for years now, my name will be even lower. It's fine really. We have different aims.  He can have the glory. I'm interested in the breakthroughs. The science that comes from these discoveries. The potential.
translation: 尽管多年来一直在资助他的工作但我的名字会更低。真的没关系。我们的目标不同  他可以拥有荣誉我对突破感兴趣从这些发现中产生的科学潜力

english: Anyway, thank you for your work, Captain. Here's a reward for your efforts.
translation: 无论如何谢谢你的工作舰长。这是对你努力的回报

english: Captain. We're hoping to run some more experiments on the new life form I discovered. The Toppingbury Tiddlet. If you could visit my institute, I have a contract that may be of interest to you.
translation: 舰长我们希望在我发现的新生命体上 再做一些实验托普平伯里提德雷如果你能访问我的研究所 我有一份你可能感兴趣的合同

english: We've made another interesting discovery!  Our sensors were correct, and it appears some type of tiny crystal has been formed at the core of several of the dead creatures.  Almost like a small diamond.
translation: 我们又有了一个有趣的发现  我们的感应器是正确的似乎在几只死亡生物的核心部位形成了某种微小的晶体。  就像一颗小钻石

english: It must have formed in the final moments of their life. All that telepathic energy, focussed into a lethal feedback loop!  Our lab tells us the crystals aren't like anything they've ever seen before.  Let's get the remaining samples in for analysis.
translation: 它一定是在他们生命的最后时刻形成的。所有的心灵感应能量 都集中在一个致命的反馈回路里  我们的实验室告诉我们 这些晶体和他们以前见过的都不一样  把剩下的样本拿去分析吧

english: *X Tiddlets now on board!  Fascinating, Captain.  It appears the Tiddlet reproductive process occurs even at incredibly short hyperspace distances.\nHow do they find the time?
translation: *X 蒂德尔斯上船了  真有趣舰长  看来即使在超空间距离极短的情况下提德雷特的繁殖过程也会发生。 他们是怎么找到时间的\n

english: I'll hand you over to my colleague for the final experiment.
translation: 我把你交给我的同事做最后的实验。

english: Captain, the Professor has asked me to oversee this phase of the experiment.
translation: 船长教授让我监督这一阶段的实验。

english: I need you to make a long range jump. Beyond the safe tiddlet distance.  We need to know what happens to them under the effects of Hyperspace Shock, and this will also help us to calculate that safe distance more accurately.
translation: 我需要你进行远距离跳跃超过安全距离  我们需要知道它们在超空间震荡的影响下会发生什么这也有助于我们更准确地计算安全距离。

english: Get into position and make the long range jump.
Let's start simple. A couple of medium range hops should do the trick.
translation: 让我们从简单的开始。几次中距离跳跃就可以了。

english: Excellent. The sensor is working nicely and we are receiving science packets. Let's do one more medium range hop to gather some more data.
translation: 非常好传感器工作正常 我们正在接收科学数据包我们再进行一次中距离跳跃收集更多数据。
至少拥有*X 跃迁燃料

english: Make a jump longer than the Tiddlet safe distance
translation: 跳跃距离超过 Tiddlet 安全距离
接收 [*X/*Y] 心灵感应传感器站

english: Return the Tiddlets to the Institute
translation: 将 Tiddlets 送回研究所

english: Return the bodies to the Institute
Travel to the Institute for Interstellar Lifeforms
translation: 前往星际生命形式研究所

english: *X of the Tiddlets appear to have perished.
translation: *X 只提德莱特似乎已经死亡。

english: That's such a horrible thing to witness.\nWe can't allow this sort of experiment to be done again, doctor. It's so unethical.
translation: \n我们不能允许这种实验再次发生 医生这太不道德了。

english: The sensor data suggests the telepathic mating ritual does begin during the longer jump.  But the telepathic energy induced between them produces so much heat at their core that they ultimately catch fire and burn out from the inside.
translation: 传感器数据显示心灵感应交配仪式确实是在较长的跳跃过程中开始的。  但它们之间的心灵感应能量在它们的核心部位产生了大量的热量最终导致它们从内部着火并烧毁。

english: One can only imagine what that must feel like.
There's something else.  There's a reading showing up on the sensors, deep inside the core of the dead tiddlets.\nBring them all back to me, Captain. I think we've done enough for today.
translation: 还有别的东西  传感器上显示出了一个读数 就在死去的小鳕鱼的核心深处\n把他们都带回来给我 舰长我想我们今天做得够多了

english: Welcome back, Captain! I must say, the corridors at the Institute have been alive with excitement over this wondrous new lifeform. My paper has already been provisionally accepted into all the top nature journals, which makes me so proud.
translation: 欢迎回来 舰长我得说研究所的走廊里都在为这种奇妙的新生命形式而兴奋不已 。我的论文已经被所有顶级自然杂志暂时录用 这让我非常自豪。

english: The word on the grapevine is that the Nobel prize committee may be looking at our work.
translation: 小道消息说诺贝尔奖委员会可能会关注我们的工作。

english: Exactly. So we must continue this important research. We have a great deal of data already, but we need to take some more measurements and refine some of our estimates. We are particularly interested in their reproductive process.
translation: 没错。 因此我们必须继续这项重要的研究。 我们已经掌握了大量数据 但我们还需要进行更多的测量 并完善我们的一些估计。 我们对它们的繁殖过程特别感兴趣。

english: We're going to send you a batch of Toppingbury Tiddlets, and we want you to run a series of tests on them under Hyperspace conditions.
translation: 我们会给你寄一批托普平伯里提德莱特 希望你在超空间条件下对它们进行一系列测试。

english: We're also sending you a pair of specially modified science stations, with a sensor attuned to their telepathic reproductive process. I wrote the firmware myself. We will be able to see deep into their minds when this magical process takes place.
translation: 我们还将给你们送去一对经过特殊改装的科学站 上面装有一个传感器 可以感应到它们的心灵感应繁殖过程。 我亲自编写了固件 当这个神奇的过程发生时 我们就能看到它们的内心深处了

english: We need you to take the tiddlets on a series of specific hyperspace jumps. We will be recording the effect on their reproductive process and on their physiology. All... well, most of these experiments can be done hopefully without any harm coming to the creatures.
translation: 我们需要你带着提德莱特进行一系列特定的超空间跳跃 。我们将记录下对它们繁殖过程和生理机能的影响 所有......好吧大部分实验都可以在不伤害生物的情况下完成。

english: We need to zero in on exactly how long the Tiddlets can survive in hyperspace. This will regrettably require you to jump beyond the safe distance, and to record the effect on their telepathic process. Some of the Tiddlets may be lost in the process of this experiment.
translation: 我们需要确定提德莱特在超空间里能存活多久 遗憾的是这需要你跃迁超过安全距离并记录下对他们心灵感应过程的影响。 在实验过程中可能会损失一些提德莱特

english: That does make me quite uncomfortable.
But with your permission, we can begin. Install the new sensors first, Captain. And be sure to stock up on FTL fuel if you need to. Three or four jumps ought to be enough.
translation: 但如果你允许 我们可以开始了 先安装新的传感器 舰长 如果需要的话一定要储备好超光速燃料 三四次跳跃应该足够了

english: *X Tiddlets so far.  This is all working very well, Captain.  Now onto the real science.
translation: *X 到目前为止都是  一切顺利 舰长  现在开始真正的科学

english: We'd like to see the effect of a very short hop.  We want to know if there is a minimum hyperspace distance, below which their reproductive process simply does not occur.  Make the jump and let's see how they do.
translation: 我们想看看极短跳跃的效果。  我们想知道是否有一个最小的超空间距离 低于这个距离它们的繁殖过程就不会发生。  进行跳跃让我们看看它们的表现。

english: Captain, there have been several developments with the Tiddlet Research Program. We are in need of a competent starship pilot once again.  Please visit us at the Institute for Interstellar lifeforms and I can tell you more.
translation: 舰长提德雷研究计划有了一些进展。我们再次需要一名合格的星舰驾驶员。  请到星际生命体研究所来我可以告诉你更多。

english: Captain, thank Goodness.  Are they all safe?
translation: 船长谢天谢地  他们都安全吗

english: Quickly, before they figure out what's happening.  I'll override the remote transceiver on the farm ship.  For a few minutes we'll be able to control it ourselves.
translation: 快点在他们发现之前  我会重启农场船上的远程收发器 I'll override the remote transceiver on the farm ship.  我们可以自己控制几分钟

english: Long enough to put an end to this horror show.  Take the ship over to the asteroid.  Open the docking bay doors.
translation: 足够长的时间来结束这场恐怖秀  把舰船开到小行星上去  打开对接舱门

english: You did the right thing, Captain.  That matters, to me at least.
translation: 你做得对 舰长 这很重要 至少对我来说是这样。

english: I wouldn't worry too much about the threat.  He knows he's operating completely illegally.  There's no way the charter of deep space life permits this kind of action.
translation: 我不太担心他的威胁。  他知道自己的行为完全非法  深空生命宪章不可能允许这种行为

english: As for the Tiddlets, the Doctor is sure to return and try to capture more.  I'll do my best to keep them safe from him, for as long as I can.
translation: 至于提德莱特一家 博士肯定会回来抓更多 我会尽我所能保护他们的安全 只要我能做到

english: You may as well keep the rescue ship.  You could sell it if you need to raise some funds.
translation: 救援船还是留着吧。  如果你需要筹集资金可以把它卖掉。

english: I'll be in touch if I need your help, Captain.
translation: 如果需要你的帮助我会联系你的舰长。

english: Captain, this is wrong.  You know it is.
translation: 队长这是不对的  你知道这是错的

english: Please don't do this.  These creatures deserve more than to be battery farmed and slaughtered.
translation: 请不要这样做。这些生物不应被密集养殖和屠杀。

english: My clearances have all been revoked.  They've shut me out completely.  It's up to you, but please make the right choice.
translation: 我的权限都被取消了  他们把我完全拒之门外  这取决于你 但请做出正确的选择

english: I'm hiding out in system S*X.  It's where you found the first Tiddlets, near that unusual asteroid.  Bring them here, and be careful not to risk Hyperspace shock.
translation: 我躲在S*X 系统里。  这是你发现第一批提德雷的地方就在那颗不寻常的小行星附近。  把他们带到这里来注意不要冒超时空震荡的危险。

english: We're going to set them all free.
Yes!  I knew this would work!  We can battery farm the tiddlets, in huge quantities, right here in this system!  Keep going.  We need more!
translation: 我就知道这行得通我们可以在这个系统里密集养殖提德莱特数量巨大继续。我们需要更多

english: It looks like that last jump fried the hop drive.  Not great, given what we paid for it.
translation: 看来最后一跳烧坏了短距跃迁引擎 考虑到我们为它花的钱这可不太好。

english: No matter.  I'm certain my engineers can repair it.  In any case, I want the hop drive to be installed on the farm ship directly.
translation: 没关系 我相信我的工程师可以修好它 无论如何我要把短距跃迁引擎直接安装在农场舰船上。

english: Dismantle the Hop Drive, Captain, and I'll send a shuttle to collect it.  I want you to replace the Hop Drive with a conventional FTL drive, for the final part of the experiment.  I'll send a replacement FTL drive in the delivery shuttle.
translation: 舰长把霍普驱动器拆了 我会派穿梭机去取的  我想让你用传统的超光速引擎 替换掉 合 驱动器 作为实验的最后一部分  我会用送货穿梭机送一个新的超光速引擎过来

english: I don't think I had the chance to properly thank you, Captain. You risked your life for us.  And now my twin is ten years older than me! It's taken some getting used to.
translation: 我想我还没机会好好感谢你舰长你为我们冒了生命危险  现在我的双胞胎比我大十岁我得适应一下

english: Captain! It's so good to hear from you again.  How have you been?
translation: 船长很高兴再次听到你的消息  最近还好吗

english: We've been taking some time to recover.  I must admit, I spent so long planning my brother's rescue, I almost don't know what to do with myself.
translation: 我们一直在花时间恢复。  我必须承认我花了很长时间来计划营救我弟弟我几乎都不知道该拿自己怎么办了。

english: I've put the rescue ship up for sale. I was asking $1M, but you can have it for half that price if you like.  Thank you, Captain.  You'll always be welcome with us.
translation: 我已经把救援船挂牌出售了。我开价100万美元但如果你愿意可以半价卖给你。  谢谢你舰长  我们永远欢迎你

english: Hello, Captain.  How have you been? Things have been tough here.
translation: 你好 舰长  最近好吗这里的日子不好过

english: Marcus has been in and out of hospital since the rescue.  He has burns all over his body, and took quite a serious dose of radiation.
translation: 自救援以来马库斯一直在医院里进进出出。  他全身烧伤还受到了严重的辐射。

english: Of course, you already know that, because it happened while he was uploading your data.
translation: 当然你已经知道了因为这是在他上传你的数据时发生的。

english: I hope it was worth it for you, Captain.
translation: 我希望这对你来说是值得的舰长。

english: The ship is up for sale.  I can't bear to be on-board any longer.  The price is $1M.  But I suppose you did help to build the hop drive, so I'll let you have it for $800k.
translation: 这艘船正在出售。  我不能再待在船上了。  价格是100万美元  但我想你确实帮忙建造了跳跃驱动器 所以我可以以80万美元的价格卖给你

english: Ten years I worked on his rescue.  Ten years.
translation: 十年来我一直致力于营救他。  十年了

english: Do you know what it's like to die from radiation poisoning?  No?  I do.  Since your rescue attempt I've watched it happen.  Hair falls out, organ failure rips through the body.  Vomiting.  Sick and blood.  For days on end.
translation: 你知道死于辐射中毒是什么感觉吗  不知道吗  我知道  自从你的营救行动后 我亲眼目睹了这一切  头发脱落 身体器官衰竭  呕吐  恶心 呕血  一连几天

english: They wouldn't even let me near him.
translation: 他们甚至不让我靠近他。

english: You did that to him, Captain.
translation: 是你把他打成这样的上尉

english: I don't want to talk to you, Captain.  Yes, the ship is for sale.  Take it.  I don't ever want to see that ship, or you, again.  Do not call me again.
translation: 我不想跟你说话 舰长  是的这艘船要卖  拿去吧  我不想再见到那艘船 也不想再见到你  别再打电话给我
再次联系马丁内斯博士

english: Excellent.  It's working, as I knew it would.  Give us three more hops, Captain.
translation: 好极了。  我就知道会成功的  再给我们三跳舰长

english: OPTIONAL: Take the Tiddlets to Professor Toppingbury instead
translation: 可选项带 Tiddlets 去见 Toppingbury 教授
密集养殖 500 只提德莱特

english: Fly L*X close to the Tiddlet farm ship
translation: 飞行L*X 靠近 Tiddlet 农场的舰船

english: Pilot the Farm Ship to the asteroid
translation: 驾驶农场舰船前往小行星
进行更多的超空间跳跃 [*X/3]

english: Bring the ship to the Institute

translation: 购买马丁内斯博士的舰船
进行远距离超光速跃迁

english: Deliver Tiddlet bodies to Dr. Swanson
translation: 将 Tiddlet 的尸体交给斯旺森博士

english: Travel to the Institute for Interstellar Lifeforms
translation: 前往星际生命形式研究所

english: The work continues, Captain. There is so much more to these Tiddlets than we realised.
translation: 工作还在继续 舰长这些提德尔特人比我们想象的要多得多

english: So, onto business.  There is a scientist by the name of Dr. Julian Martinez in a nearby system. He had a moment of fame recently after a daring rescue of his brother.  He has a ship for sale that we believe will be of some use.
translation: 说正事吧  在附近的一个星系里 有一个叫朱利安·马丁内斯博士的科学家他最近因为大胆营救自己的弟弟而声名大噪 He had a moment of fame recently after a daring rescue of his brother.  他有一艘舰船要出售 我们相信会有些用处的

english: Travel to the noble Doctor and buy his ship. He wants a million credits, which is ridiculous.  He thinks his invention is worth that much.  Negotiate with him, knock that price down, and I'll wire the funds directly to him.  If you can improve his offer then I'll pay you 20% of the savings as a bonus.
translation: 前往贵族博士那里买下他的舰船。他要一百万信用点这太荒唐了。  他觉得他的发明值那么多钱  和他谈判把价格压低我会直接把钱汇给他。  如果你能提高他的出价 我会把节省下来的 20% 作为奖金给你

english: Regrettably, Professor Toppingbury has been forced to take a leave of absence.  From the stress of his work, you understand.
translation: 很遗憾 托平伯里教授被迫请假了  工作压力太大你能理解的。

english: We know how they reproduce now, and we know their limits. During hyperspace travel, 3 of them will telepathically reproduce.
translation: 我们现在知道它们是如何繁殖的也知道它们的极限。在超空间旅行中它们中的 3 个会通过心灵感应进行繁殖。

english: We're not quite sure yet how long it takes for their children to grow up. However, we've noticed they hop at exactly the same time their parents do.
translation: 我们还不太清楚他们的孩子需要多久才能长大。不过我们注意到他们与父母在同一时间蹦蹦跳跳。

english: This isn't important, but I thought you might find it amusing.
translation: 这并不重要但我觉得你可能会觉得很有趣。

english: As you've already seen, they experience hyperspace shock if they've been in hyperspace travel for too long.
translation: 正如你们已经看到的如果超空间旅行时间过长它们就会出现超空间震荡。

english: But the key is in the final stage of their life-cycle.  We know if we expose them to hyperspace shock, their telepathic energies are so strong that a small crystal is formed in their final moments.
translation: 但关键在于它们生命周期的最后阶段  我们知道如果让它们受到超空间冲击 它们的心灵感应能量会非常强大 在它们最后的时刻会形成一个小晶体

english: We've been studying the crystals we've recovered so far.  They resonate in subspace in a way we've never seen before.  Some of the crystals are entangled at the quantum level, and resonate together.  Apply a signal to one and another responds, instantly, across any distance.
translation: 我们一直在研究目前找到的晶体  它们在亚空间产生的共振 是我们从未见过的  有些晶体在量子层面上纠缠在一起 产生了共振  对其中一个施加信号 另一个就会立即响应 无论距离多远

english: There are so many potential applications.
translation: 潜在的应用领域太多了。

english: Incredible work, Captain. I'm not sure how you managed that, but I'm true to my word.  I'll wire the funds to Dr. Martinez, with a sales bonus of $100k for you.  Bring the ship back to the Institute, and let's put it to use.
translation: 干得漂亮舰长我不知道你是怎么做到的 但我说到做到  我会把钱汇给马丁内斯博士 还会给你10万美元的销售奖金  把舰船开回研究所 让我们好好利用它

english: Good work, Captain. That's a good price.  I'll send the funds to Dr Martinez.  You've earned a sales bonus of $40k.  Bring the ship back to the Institute, and let's put it to use.
translation: 干得好 舰长这个价钱不错  我会把钱寄给马丁内斯医生 I'll send the funds to Dr Martinez.  你已经获得了4万美元的销售奖金  把舰船开回研究所 让我们好好利用它

english: Very disappointing, Captain.  You'll need to do better if you want to succeed out here.  This ship is costing us an arm and a leg.
translation: 非常令人失望 队长  如果你想在这里取得成功 你必须做得更好  这艘船让我们损失惨重

english: I'll send the funds to Dr. Martinez now.  Bring the ship back to the Institute, and we can begin work.
translation: 我现在就把钱给马丁内斯博士 I'll send the funds to Dr. Martinez now.  把舰船开回研究所 我们就可以开始工作了

english: Well done, Captain.  Everything has worked exactly as I predicted, and we now have an excellent harvest on the farm ship.  More importantly, you've shown the way.
translation: 干得好舰长。  一切都在我的预料之中 我们的农船现在丰收了  更重要的是你为我们指明了方向。

english: I think I can take it from here, Captain.  My engineers tell me they'll have the Hop Drive fitted to the farm ship in just a few days.  In fact, we are close to automating the entire Tiddlet Harvest process with this one ship.
translation: 我想我可以接手舰长  我的工程师告诉我 几天内他们就能把 合 传动装置 安装到农场船上了  事实上我们就快要用这艘船 实现整个提德雷收获过程的自动化了

english: I knew we could rely on you, Captain.  Thank you for showing the highest degrees of professionalism.
translation: 我知道我们可以依靠你舰长。  谢谢你表现出的高度专业精神。

english: As for the rescue ship, we don't need it anymore.  It was the Hop Drive we wanted.  You can keep it if you want, or sell it.
translation: 至于救援船我们不再需要它了。它是我们想要的跳跃驱动器。你想留着就留着想卖就卖掉。

english: I'll be in touch if your services are required in the future.
translation: 如果将来需要你们的服务我会与你们联系。

english: Captain, we lost contact with our ship for a second.  Where are you?  You seem to have gone completely off course.
translation: 舰长 我们和舰船失去了联系 你们在哪里 你们似乎完全偏离了航线

english: My God.  What have you done?
translation: 我的天 你都干了些什么

english: Where are they?  Where are my Tiddlets??
translation: 它们在哪里 我的提德莱特在哪里

english: Mark my words, Captain.  You will bitterly regret crossing me.
translation: 记住我的话 舰长 你会后悔和我作对的

english: Grand Larceny, Property Damage, Fraud, Sabotage.  I'll see to it you spend the next decade in space prison for this.  You and that Professor.
translation: 重大盗窃罪 财产损失罪 欺诈罪 破坏罪  我会让你在太空监狱里待上十年的  你和那个教授

english: This is it, Captain. We stand on the verge of a massive achievement.  Can you imagine how many crystals we can produce, in just one jump?  There could be hundreds.  The research potentials are staggering.
translation: 就是这个队长。我们即将取得巨大的成就。你能想象我们一次跳跃能生产多少水晶吗可能有几百颗。研究潜力惊人。

english: You know what to do, Captain.  A couple of very long jumps ought to be enough.  Bring them all back to me when it's done.
translation: 你知道该怎么做 舰长  跳几下就够了  完成后把他们都带回来给我

english: Our plan is simple, Captain.  We found during your excellent field work that the Tiddlets will still reproduce, even with an incredibly short FTL jump.
translation: 我们的计划很简单 舰长 我们在你出色的实地考察中发现 提德莱特即使在超光速跃迁时间极短的情况下 依然会繁殖后代

english: The ship you just purchased has a specially modified FTL Hop Drive.  We can use it to make very short jumps and trigger the hyperspace reproductive process among the Tiddlets.
translation: 你刚买的舰船有一个特别改装的超光速跃迁引擎 我们可以用它进行极短的跃迁并触发提德莱特的超空间繁殖过程。

english: We want you to pair the Hop Drive ship with our Tiddlet Farm vessel, and activate the short range hop drive.  You won't even need to leave the system.  If our calculations are correct, we should see an instant result.
translation: 我们想让你把 跳跃驱动 舰船 和我们的 提德莱特农场 舰船配对 然后启动短程 跳跃驱动  你甚至不需要离开这个系统。  如果我们的计算正确的话应该马上就能看到结果。
Tiddlets 的麻烦第 3 部分

english: This is Dr Swanson at the Institute for Interstellar Lifeforms. I'm declaring an emergency. We need urgent assistance. Our ship is compromised. Please, to any vessel nearby, we need emergency rescue. Many lives are at stake.
translation: 我是星际生命体研究所的斯旺森博士我宣布紧急状况我们需要紧急援助我们的舰船受损了请通知附近的船只 我们需要紧急救援许多生命危在旦夕

english: I tried to stop him. Tried to warn him.
translation: 我试图阻止他。试图警告他

english: Captain, these recent events have made me reconsider my role in all of this. These creatures need our protection. They need somebody to look out for them.
translation: 船长最近发生的这些事让我重新考虑了我在这一切中的角色。这些生物需要我们的保护它们需要有人照顾

english: I want to thank you for helping, Captain, when it counted. For doing the right thing. I'll split the remaining grant money I have with you. You deserve it.
translation: 我要感谢你在关键时刻伸出援手舰长。做了正确的事我会把剩下的补助金分给你这是你应得的

english: One last thing.  I couldn't help but notice you've picked up a couple of Tiddlets, along with the scientists you rescued. I wouldn't worry - two is a very safe number.
translation: 最后一件事  我注意到你在救回科学家的同时还救回了几个提德莱人。我不担心两个是很安全的数字。

english: But I'd recommend you never bring a third aboard.  Look after them, Captain. I know you will.
translation: 但我建议你不要带第三个人上船  照顾好他们舰长我知道你会的

english: I thought Dr Swanson was my ally. And I thought I could trust you. But you both put money before everything else. I don't know how you can live like that.
translation: 我以为斯旺森医生是我的盟友我以为我可以信任你但你们都把钱看得比什么都重要我不知道你们怎么能这样生活 I don't know how you can live like that.

english: You've one last chance to make things right. It looks like a couple of Tiddlets found their way onboard with the scientists you rescued. Two is probably safe, but never bring a third aboard.
translation: 你还有最后一次机会来纠正错误看起来有几只提德尔特人 和你救出的科学家一起上船了两个可能安全但千万别带第三个上船

english: I suggest you look after them from now on, Captain. It won't atone for the things you've done, but it's a start.
translation: 我建议你从现在开始照顾他们舰长这不能弥补你做过的事 但这是个开始

english: It looks like the Hop Drive burned through all the jump charges. It's over.
translation: 看来跳跃驱动器烧光了所有的跳跃充能。结束了。

english: Rescue the crew of the farm ship

translation: 回应斯旺森的求救信号

english: Oh god... they're in the food stuffs!
Oh god... they're in the air-conditioning system!
translation: 天啊......它们在空调系统里

english: Oh god... they're in the reactor room!
translation: 天啊......他们在反应堆室里

english: Captain, I don't know what happened. It's the Hop Drive. My engineers told me they tested it fully!
translation: 队长我不知道发生了什么事是Hop驱动器我的工程师告诉我 他们已经完全测试过了

english: There's something wrong with it. We can't stop jumping. They've replicated... so many times. They're EVERYWHERE!
translation: 有些不对劲我们不能停止跳跃它们复制了......那么多次。它们无处不在

english: Oh God. There's so many of them! They're in the engines... the life support... they're almost in the reac-
translation: 我的天啊它们太多了它们在引擎里......在生命维持系统里......它们几乎在后舱里了

english: Get away from that console! Shoo!
You have to help us, Captain.

translation: Tiddlets 的麻烦第 4 部分

english: Help Prof. Artemis Toppingbury with his research.
translation: 帮助阿尔忒弥斯-托平伯里教授开展研究。

english: Civilians are offering larger sums than normal for safe transit out of the sector
translation: 平民为安全离开该星区提供了比平常更高的报酬

english: Prices for hardware and crew are lower than normal, due to panic
translation: 由于恐慌硬件和船员的价格低于正常水平

english: Shortages of critical resources have made prices higher than normal
translation: 关键资源短缺导致价格高于正常水平

english: This is what you are translating.
translation: 这就是你要翻译的内容。

english: You cannot change the English phrases.
Opens the folder in which your modified translations are saved.\n\nlanguage.csv is the file containing your modified translations.
translation: 打开保存已修改翻译的文件夹。\n\nlanguage.csv 是包含已修改翻译的文件。

english: This is where you can change the translation.\n\nThis will affect your game only, unless you submit your updated translations to Introversion.
translation: \n\n这只会影响您的游戏除非您将更新后的翻译提交给 Introversion。

english: This is what is currently used in the game.
translation: 这就是目前游戏中使用的方法。

english: Resets your modified translation back to the original translation.
translation: 将修改后的译文重置为原始译文。

english: The AIRDUCT needs to be powered from the REACTOR. Select CABLES from the CONSTRUCTION menu.
translation: 通风管需要由反应堆供电。 从 “建造”菜单中选择 “线缆”。

english: Drag a power cable from the REACTOR to the AIRDUCT, connecting the red circles. POWER CABLES are used to connect reactors to any equipment that needs power. POWER CABLES are red and must connect red circles on equipment.
translation: 将电力线缆从 反应堆 拖到 通风管连接红圈。 电力线缆用于连接反应堆和任何需要电源的设备。 电力线缆为红色必须连接设备上的红色圆圈。

english: The AIRDUCT is activated and is pressurising the cabin! The atmosphere will soon be breathable.
translation: 通风管已启动正在给机舱加压大气很快就可以呼吸了。

english: We now need to provide a breathable atmosphere for our crew. This is done with an AIRDUCT.\n\nInstall an AIRDUCT somewhere near the Reactor.
translation: 现在我们需要为船员提供一个可呼吸的环境。这是通过通风管完成的。\n\n在反应堆附近安装一个通风管。

english: The AIRDUCT needs OXYGEN, in the same way as the REACTOR needs FUEL. We can use an OXYGEN LOADER to provide OXYGEN.\n\nInstall an OXYGEN LOADER near the AIRDUCT.
translation: 通风管需要氧气就像反应堆需要燃料一样。我们可以使用氧气装载器来提供氧气。\n\n在通风管附近安装氧气装载器。

english: We need to connect the OXYGEN LOADER into the AIRDUCT using PIPES.\n\nSelect PIPES from the CONSTRUCTION menu.
translation: 我们需要用管道将氧气装载器连接到通风管中。\n\n从建造菜单中选择管道。

english: Drag a PIPE from the OXYGEN LOADER to the AIRDUCT, connecting the BLUE circles.
translation: 将一根管道从氧气装载器拖到通风管连接蓝色圆圈。

english: BATTLE STATIONS must be activated before your weapons can be used.\n\nThis will tell your crew to prepare for battle!
translation: 战斗岗位 必须在您使用武器之前启动。\n\n这将告诉您的船员做好战斗准备

english: Your crew will run to the weapons to deploy them.\n\nGatling guns don't require any crew to deploy them.
translation: \n\n加特林机枪不需要任何人员来部署。

english: The gun barrels will begin to extend when they arrive.\n\nWhen the barrels are fully extended they will be ready to fire!
translation: \n\n当枪管完全伸出时就可以开火了

english: We are now going to learn how to deploy our weapons for combat.\n\nThe game has been paused for now.
Well done, your weapons are now successfully deployed for battle!
translation: 干得好你们的武器已成功部署到战斗中

english: NOTE: You can SHIFT CLICK to buy in multiples of 5.
translation: 注意您可以按 SHIFT 键 以 5 的倍数购买。

english: Click on the BUY button to purchase the JMC MINING STATION.
translation: 点击购买按钮购买JMC MINING STATION。

english: Click on the JMC MINING STATION, an old unused industrial station for sale.
translation: 点击 JMC MINING STATION这是一个待售的闲置旧工业站。

english: We are now going to learn about selecting and buying ships.
translation: 现在我们将学习如何选择和购买船只。

english: Well done, you have purchased the JMC MINING STATION.
translation: 干得好您已经购买了 JMC MINING STATION。

english: Use {PanUp1}{PanLeft1}{PanDown1}{PanRight1} or the ARROW KEYS to move the view around. Zoom the view using the MOUSE WHEEL, or {ZoomIn}/{ZoomOut} on the keyboard. Drag the view by holding the MIDDLE MOUSE BUTTON.
translation: 使用{PanUp1}{PanLeft1} {PanDown1} {PanRight1} 或箭头键移动视图。 使用鼠标滚轮或键盘上的{ZoomIn}/{ZoomOut} 缩放视图。 按住鼠标中键拖动视图。

english: The effect of the EMP is wearing off!\n\nDeploy your weapons and make your crew ready to fight by clicking on BATTLE STATIONS.
translation: 电磁脉冲的效果正在消失\n\n点击 战斗岗位部署你的武器让你的船员做好战斗准备。

english: Make sure to keep moving during combat, this increases your EVASION and makes you a harder target to hit.
translation: 确保在战斗中保持移动这会增加你的 闪避率使你成为更难击中的目标。

english: You can see the range of weapons by hovering over them. Weapons will shoot at enemy ships in their range.
translation: 将鼠标悬停在武器上可以看到武器的射程。武器会向其射程内的敌舰射击。

english: Your guns can also target specific points on enemy ships. First, select which guns you would like to use. You can SHIFT CLICK to select multiple guns.
translation: 您的火炮还可以瞄准敌舰上的特定点。 首先选择您要使用的火炮。 您可以 按住 Shift 点击 来选择多个火炮。

english: Target their weapon systems so that they can't damage you further.
translation: 瞄准他们的武器系统让他们无法进一步伤害你。

english: We are now going to learn some basic combat techniques.
translation: 我们现在要学习一些基本的战斗技巧。

english: Well done. You have learned how to use weapons. Now fire at will at the pirate ship!
translation: 干得好你们已经学会了如何使用武器。现在随意向海盗船开火

english: Use your main ship engines to get close to the *X.
In order to be able to dock successfully, your ship needs at least four working THRUSTERS.\n\nUse a different ship, or purchase and install four thrusters at a nearby trading post.
translation: 为了能够成功停靠您的舰船至少需要四个工作的推进器。\n\n使用不同的舰船或者在附近的贸易站购买并安装四个推进器。

english: Use your THRUSTERS to maneuver your ship so that RED diamonds of your docking ports align with the docking port of the *X. When aligned correctly, they will both turn YELLOW. Keep the ships aligned until the docking bridge is fully extended.
translation: 使用推进器操纵舰船使对接口的红十字与*X 的对接口对齐。 对齐后它们都会变成黄色。 保持舰船对齐直到对接桥完全伸出。

english: Use the Maneuvering controls to move the ship into position.\n\nYou can also use the keys {ManoeuvreUp}, {ManoeuvreLeft}, {ManoeuvreDown}, {ManoeuvreRight} to move, and {ManoeuvreClockwise} and {ManoeuvreCounterClockwise} to rotate the ship.
translation: 使用姿态控制将舰船移动到位。\n\n您还可以使用{ManoeuvreUp}、{ManoeuvreLeft}、{ManoeuvreDown}、{ManoeuvreRight} 键移动舰船以及{ManoeuvreClockwise} 和{ManoeuvreCounterClockwise} 键旋转舰船。

english: We are now going to learn how to dock your ship to another ship.
translation: 现在我们来学习如何将舰船停靠在另一艘舰船上。

english: Well done. You have docked successfully!
To get started, switch to TACTICAL mode by clicking the button or pressing {ToggleTactical}.
translation: 要开始操作请单击按钮或按{ToggleTactical} 切换到 战术 模式。

english: Zoom in so that you can see the docking guides more clearly. They are RED diamonds extending from the docking ports.
translation: 放大以便更清楚地看到对接导轨。它们是从对接口延伸出来的红色钻石。

english: Any equipment can be dismantled by left-clicking.
translation: 任何设备都可以通过左键单击进行拆卸。

english: We can stop dismantling by clicking the dismantle button again or by closing the construction menu.\n\nClose the menu by clicking the CONSTRUCTION button or by pressing ESC.
translation: 我们可以通过再次点击拆解按钮或关闭建造菜单来停止拆解。\n\n点击“建造”按钮或按下ESC键关闭菜单。

english: Dismantling equipment removes it from your ship and places it in a box so you can install it later.
translation: 拆卸设备可将其从舰船上拆下并放入一个盒子中以便以后安装。

english: This equipment is ruined, so you'll receive scrap metal when you dismantle it.
translation: 这些设备已被毁坏拆卸时会得到废金属。

english: Let's use the scrap metal to produce metal ingots in the smelter. Right-click on the smelter.
translation: 让我们用废金属在冶炼机中生产金属锭。 右键单击冶炼机。

english: Right-clicking on equipment allows you to set recipes. Set the smelter recipe to scrap metal.
translation: 右键单击设备可以设置配方。将冶炼机配方设置为废金属。
